title: I was diagnosed with skin cancer at just 33 – here’s five signs to look out for and my advice on checking your skin
creator: Jodie McCormack
content: AN outdoor worker has issued a major warning after being diagnosed with skin cancer at just 33 years old. Paul revealed he received the melanoma diagnosis after noticing a freckle on his ear had changed. The Donegal man teamed up with the HSE to share his story and urge people to be vigilant for skin cancer symptoms . He stressed the importance of knowing what your skin usually looks like so you can identify any changes . In a video from the HSE as part of their SunSmart campaign, Paul shared his diagnosis story saying: "I was diagnosed with having a melanoma skin cancer on my ear at the age of 33. "In December 2023 I noticed a freckle had slightly changed on my ear and it turned into a wee brown spot. "I passed no heed as I was back boxing at the time and I thought maybe I just got hit on the ear." However, Paul revealed when the spot was still there after a few months a friend questioned him and warned it could be melanoma. The friend told Paul: "You know that's not good if something appears like that it could be a melanoma." After doing some research following the friend's warning Paul made an appointment with his doctor to get it checked. The doctor told Paul the signs they would look for are shape, size, colour, pattern and colour and all were present. Paul had been working outdoors since he was 16 and admitted he had not been protecting his skin over the years. 0utdoor workers are exposed to two to three times more UV rays than people who work indoors. Figures from the...

title: What Time Are the 2024 Emmys? Here’s When the Awards Show Starts and More
creator: Vivian
content: After the delayed 2023 Emmys ceremony in January, the 76th Annual Primetime Emmy Awards are back and set for Sunday. Hollywood will celebrate the best in television that aired between June 2023 and May 2024, with the awards show hosted by legendary comedy actor Eugene Levy and his actor-producer son, Dan Levy . Find out everything you need to know about the 2024 Emmy Awards — including event start times, who’s nominated, and more — below. What Time Are the 2024 Emmys? Television’s biggest event will air on Sunday night at 8 p.m. ET (5 p.m. Pacific), two hours after the red carpet festivities begin. The Emmys typically run on schedule and conclude in about three hours. Where Can I Watch the 2024 Emmys? ABC is broadcasting the ceremony live from the Peacock Theater in downtown Los Angeles, with streaming available on Hulu the following day. The event can also be streamed live on PEOPLE and EW ‘s websites, as well as on several social platforms, including YouTube, TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, and The Roku Channel. When Is the Red Carpet for the 2024 Emmys? The cable network E! will air a red carpet show starting at 6 p.m. Eastern, hosted by Laverne Cox , comedian Heather McMahan , and E! host Keltie Knight . The show will stream live on E! and on the outlet’s social media accounts, including YouTube and Instagram . E! News will also feature three programs leading up to the ceremony: Live From E!: Countdown to the Emmys at 5 p.m. ET/2 p.m. PT, Live From E!: Emmys at 6 p.m....

title: Triângulo amoroso e guerra de poder: antes de Queen Woo, esta série sul-coreana foi polêmica entre historiadores, mas é um clássico que todos precisam assistir
content: Quem está começando a aventurar-se pelo mundo dos k-dramas, c-dramas e doramas com certeza deve por Imperatriz Ki em sua lista, ainda mais se você curte dramas históricos. Semelhante a Queen Wo, que está fazendo grande sucesso, Imperatriz Ki segue uma das mulheres mais poderosas e importantes da Coreia que subiu na monarquia do Impéio Mongol quando este controlava a China. Onde assistir Queen Woo, a série sul-coreana comparada a Game of Thrones? Com 51 episódios e disponível atualmente no Viki , Imperatriz Ki tem alguns dos grandes nomes das produções sul-coreanas, como Ha Ji-won, Joo Jin-mo, Ji Chang-wook e Baek Jin-hee. Do que se trata Imperatriz Ki? Ambientando no século 14, seguimos Ki Seung-nyang, uma menina de uma tribo de Goryeo (antiga Coreia) que tem sua família morte e, para sobreviver, disfarça de menino. Após algum tempo, ela deixa essa sua identidade para trás e, para vingar-se, entra para o castelo do imperador de Yuan (uma dinastia imperial da China liderada pelos mongóis e um estado sucessor do Império Mongol após sua divisão) como uma serva, mas logo se torna concubina e vai subindo no ranking de poder até virar Imperatriz do Império Yuan. Ao mesmo tempo, vemos ela em um triângulo amoroso entre o monarca Toghon Temür e Wang Yoo, rei de Goryeo. A série ainda ressalta sua ambição política e seu conflito interno por ser governante do Império Yuan, mas uma pessoa que nasceu em Goryeo. O k-drama foi inspirado na imperatriz real Gi,...

title: Transcript: David Becker and Chris Krebs on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Sept. 15, 2024

MARGARET BRENNAN: For more on the upcoming election and the efforts underway to secure the vote, we turn to David Becker. He's a former civil rights attorney at the Department of Justice who now leads the center of election innovation and research. He's also a CBS contributor on election law. And Chris Krebs, the former director of the cybersecurity and infrastructure security agency, now an expert and analyst here at CBS Good to have you both. David, let me start with you. We saw this letter this past week from Secretaries of State in all fifty states and District of Columbia, issuing concern that we could see voters disenfranchised because of this increase in mail returned as undeliverable at higher than usual rates, even in cases where a voter is known not to have moved. And Donald Trump was tweeting about this this morning, you can't trust the Postal Service. How much of a problem is this going to be for mail in voting? DAVID BECKER: Well, it's a potential problem. I'm hearing this from- from state officials and local officials, of course, there in the States, and we are seeing mail voting spread as an option around the...

title: Experts: 3 Different Approaches to Wealth Management You Should Know
creator: GOBankingRates
content: Anyone who tells you that navigating the complexity of the current financial landscape is easy or that there is just one path to take may not have an investment philosophy worth following. While no single method or service fits all in the United States, understanding different approaches can help you make informed decisions that align with your short-term and long-term financial objectives. Whether you’re a novice when it comes to Wall Street or just want to see your assets managed more profitably, there is, in fact, a different approach for different folks. From risk management to sustainable investing, experts like Warren Buffett, Mark Cuban and Tony Robbins recommend a variety of strategies, products and services that cater to a broad range of needs. Here are four that stand out. Earning passive income doesn't need to be difficult. According to Buffett, forming positive money habits is the first step to accomplishing more successful and traditional wealth management strategies. In 2007, at the University of Florida, he said, “Most behavior is habitual, and they say that the chains of habit are too light to be felt until they are too heavy to be broken.” This approach to financial planning involves developing a broad, personalized strategy encompassing various aspects of personal finance, including investments, estate planning, tax management and retirement planning. Your own could work with you to build a portfolio that balances risk tolerance with long-term objectives....

title: Soruşturmanın seyrini değiştirmişler! Narin'in 2 akrabası daha gözaltına alındı
Игорь Криушенко: "Ситуация понятна: только мы сами себя можем вытащить"
content: "По горячим следам сложно сказать конкретно, что случилось. Для анализа нужно, по крайней мере, посмотреть. Но то количество ошибок, которые мы допустили уже вначале, просто зашкаливало. А соперник, имея в атаке игроков достаточно хорошего уровня, не простил нас ни в одном из тех моментов. Вообще скажу, что подкупает то, что ребята старались. У них было огромное желание и стремление. И моментов мы создали достаточно. Единственное, реализация подвела. Еще раз скажу: "Динамо" нас ни разу не простило за ошибки, мы же не все реализовали то, что создали. Скажу, что наша команда будет сражаться и бороться в каждой игре. Ситуация понятна: только мы сами себя можем вытащить, а для этого нужно в каждом матче набирать очки. Ничего страшного не случилось, просто получили большую порцию пищи для размышления. Еще раз говорю: есть моменты, вселяющие оптимизм. Ребятам после матча сказал, чтобы не опускали голову и работали дальше. Сейчас команда отдохнет денек. Наберется эмоций, а после будем готовиться к матчу с "Гомелем", — сказал Криушенко.

title: Avoid These 30 States in Retirement If You Want To Keep Your Money
creator: GOBankingRates
content: Finding the right place to live out your years isn’t easy. There’s a lot to consider, such as the cost of living, access to healthcare and taxes. Besides financial concerns, you’ll want to select a place that suits your lifestyle and offers activities that appeal to you, such as golf or the arts. Some states are more retiree friendly than others. If you’ll receive a pension or Social Security, consider whether your chosen state taxes your benefits. If you plan to buy a new home or already own one, compare property tax rates. You’ll find that your money stretches farther in some states than others. Another factor is access to healthcare. If you have a medical condition, look for a location that provides the treatment you need. As you age, you may need additional medical care, including assisted living or nursing home services. Costs for healthcare needs may differ significantly from state to state. GOBankingRates analyzed all 50 states across several financial factors, including state sales tax rates, property tax, home values, annual healthcare spending, cost of living and average Social Security benefits. title: Tears as Shelter Dog's Day Out With Volunteer Ends—But a Surprise Awaits
content: The internet was brought to tears by a rescue dog's sad face upon returning to an animal shelter—but she had no idea that there was a big surprise in store. The dog, named Franny, was in the shelter for over four months, spending the last two in quarantine with heartworm. Danielle Baughman, who volunteers at the shelter in New Kensington, Pennsylvania, told that she would go and sit with her every day for company, but Franny "would get very sad" when that was over, and she had to go back to being alone. When the quarantine was over, Franny got to spend the day out with another volunteer, named Lindsey, but she was devastated to return to the shelter afterwards. She couldn't get excited about the prospect of being cooped up in a crate, and as the car pulled up to Animal Protectors of Allegheny Valley, her demeanor changed instantly. "She is a wonderful dog, so a volunteer jumped at the chance to take her on a doggie day out and took Franny to her son's baseball practice and then a pool party," Baughman said. "When they pulled into the shelter, Franny's head hung so low. The volunteer cried all night thinking about how sad she was." After Franny left such a lasting mark, Lindsey didn't waste time before returning again the following day to see her again. She took Franny home for a sleepover, and she was "so well behaved and perfect," that Lindsey knew she'd found . "She took her back to the shelter and recorded her pulling in. Franny's head hung low again because she didn't...

title: Azərbaycanda meymunçiçəyinə qarşı vaksinasiya məcburi olacaq?
content: xəbər verir ki, bu məsələ ictimaiyyətdə müzakirələrə səbəb olub. Belə ki, təkrar pandemiya elan olunacağı və məcburi vaksinasiyanın həyata keçiriləcəyinə dair narahatlıq artıb. Azərbaycanda meymunçiçəyinə qarşı məcburi vaksinasiya ola bilərmi? Mövzu ilə bağlı Globalinfo.az-a danışan həkim-fitoterapevt Füzuli Hüseynovun sözlərinə görə, bu məsələ xəstəliyin gedişatından asılıdır. O deyib ki, əgər virusun yayılma tempi sürətlənərsə, vaksinasiya məcburi olacaq: "Meymunçiçəyinin yayılma tempi yavaş irəliləyərsə, peyvənd vurmaq könüllü ola bilər, amma sürətlə gedərsə, məcburi vaksinasiyaya keçmək mümkündür. Açığı, bu virus indiyə qədər olmayan bir xəstəlikdir. Bənzər xəstəliklər gələcəkdə daha da çoxalacaq. Çünki bununla paralel laboratoriyalar da inkişaf edir. Onların arxasında isə böyük miqdarda pullar dayanır. Mənim fikrimcə, bunun hamısı nəzarət altında olan əməllərdir. Sürət tempinin artması gözləniləndir. O halda isə vaksinasiya məcburi olacaq". Həkim bu xəstəlikdən qorunma yollarını açıqlayıb: "Bunlar hamısı virus infeksiyalarıdır. Bu tip virusların əksəriyyəti adətən hava-damcı yolu ilə yayılır. Amma meymunçiçəyinin təmas yolu ilə digər şəxsə keçdiyi deyilir. Təmas yolu ilə keçən infeksiyalarda o qədər də sürətli artım tempi olmur. Lakin yoluxma artarsa, bizim yeganə yolumuz immun sistemini gücləndirməkdən keçir. İmmun sistemimiz nə qədər güclü olsa, biz infeksiyanı qarşılayıb, yola da sala bilərik və heç bir problem...

title: Fall equinox 2024: When it is, why it happens and what to look for
content: While meteorologists like to call fall at the beginning of September, astronomical autumn starts later, on the autumnal equinox . This year, it falls on Sunday, Sept. 22 at 8:44 a.m. EDT (12:44 UTC), according to the National Weather Service . At this specific time, Earth's axis is tilted side-on to the sun, meaning there's an almost equal amount of sunlight and darkness across the globe. This celestial geometry marks the changing of the seasons — from summer to autumn in the Northern Hemisphere and from winter to spring in the Southern Hemisphere. The word "equinox" is Latin for "equal night," one of two days per year when the lengths of daylight and darkness are the same across the globe. The fall equinox is an important way to mark Earth's annual journey around the sun. The hours of darkness will gradually increase north of the equator until the solstice on Dec. 21, and vice versa south of the equator. Related: 'Potentially hazardous' asteroid the size of a skyscraper to skim past Earth on Tuesday More hours of night also mean more hours for stargazing; some of the year's best meteor showers are yet to come , and the next three full moons, including the Harvest Moon on Sept. 17 , will be supermoons — making them appear bigger and brighter in the sky. If you don't have a good pair of stargazing binoculars or a nice backyard telescope , now's a great time to invest in one. The equinoxes and solstices result from Earth's axis, which is tilted by 23.5 degrees, meaning...

title: Why it takes more than the fed to keep US out of recession
creator: Yahoo Finance Video
content: After spending 40 years on Wall Street and serving at the former Wells Fargo chief investment strategist, knows a thing or two about how the economy moves. Paulsen joined Yahoo Finance’s on Opening Bid to break down why the US economy has path's to success outside of the Fed's impact. "Fiscal policy is sort of a life on its own if the economy slows deficit spending goes up automatically and vice versa," he explained. For full episodes of Opening Bid, on our website or on your favorite podcast platform. Video Transcript So we've got a lot of easing in the pipeline that's outside of the Fed's purview or control if you will. And I think that easing is going to keep us out of a recession, even though the Fed is tardy. I think there is too much focus on the, on the Fed. The fact of the matter is you and me manage the growth in the money supply, you and me manage the level of bond yields. We manage the, the level of where the dollar is going to settle in and actually fiscal policy is sort of a life on its own if the economy slows deficit spending goes up automatically and vice versa. So while, while the Fed has regular meetings and television, uh press conferences, the the free market Laissez Faire policy officials don't do that, but they do act and I think they've been easing now for a fair period of time and with a lag of about 6 to 6 months to a year, those policies are going to start to improve economic growth again as we look forward to the next year.

title: Dijital paranın avantajları ve güvenlik riskleri neler?
content: Dijital paranın hızla hayatımıza giren yeni bir uygulama olduğunu belirten Prof. Dr. Burhan Pektaş, işletmelerin dijital ödeme sistemlerine geçişinde önemli artılar ve bazı riskler bulunduğunu vurguladı. Prof. Dr. Burhan Pektaş, dijital paraya geçmenin avantajlarını şöyle sıraladı: “Dijital para kolay, hızlı ve temassız işlemlere olanak tanır ve kullanıcı deneyimini geliştirir. Basım, dağıtım ve elleçleme gibi fiziksel nakitle ilişkili maliyetleri azaltır. Ayrıca dijital işlemler takip edilebilir, dolandırıcılık, kara para aklama ve diğer yasa dışı faaliyetleri azaltır. Cep telefonları ve internet erişimi aracılığıyla banka hesabı olmayan veya yetersiz banka hesabı olan kişilere finansal hizmetlere erişim sağlar. İşlemleri hızlandırır, ödeme sürelerini azaltır ve genel ekonomik üretkenliği artırabilir.” YAŞLI NÜFUS VEYA DİJİTAL CİHAZLARA ERİŞİMİ OLMAYANLAR UYUM SAĞLAMADA ZORLANABİLİR Dijital paraya geçmenin dezavantajları konusunda da bilgi veren Prof. Dr. Burhan Pektaş, “Dijital para işlemleri takip edilebilir, bu da veri gizliliği ve gözetim konusunda endişelere yol açar. Dijital cüzdanları ve ödeme sistemlerini hedef alan bilgisayar korsanlığı, dijital hırsızlık ve siber saldırı riskinin artmasına neden olur. Tüm bölgelerde mevcut veya güvenilir olmayabilecek sağlam bir dijital altyapı gerektirir. Üstelik internet erişimindeki kesintiler, elektrik kesintileri veya sistem arızaları işlemleri durdurabilir. Yaşlı...

title: Barceló Fortina has 'probably the best view' on Europe's sunniest island
creator: mirrornews@mirror.co.uk (Phoebe Jobling)
content: Vibe Step out onto the balcony and you’ll be met with a serene blue sea and a panoramic view of Valletta – Malta’s capital – from most of the 183 rooms at Barceló Fortina Malta . The contemporary hotel, which first opened its doors in 1966, recently underwent a £30million transformation and is now part of the prestigious Barceló Hotel Group. It aims to give guests the luxury five-star experience and quality you’d expect, but with an added touch of Maltese authenticity. Set on Sliema’s south-facing seafront, you’re unlikely to find accommodation in a better spot on this part of the Mediterranean island, with a 3.75-mile promenade, Tigné Point Beach and an array of shops, bars and restaurants just a stone’s throw away. Malta is the sunniest country in Europe , basking in more than 300 days of sunshine a year, with temperatures hitting highs of around 32°C in July and dropping to a pleasant 17°C in December. Style Expect sunrays to beam through the floor-to-ceiling windows of your spacious room pretty much every day, filling every corner with natural light. You’ll be consistently wowed by the hotel’s luxurious ambience, from its sleek room design to its carefully thought-out details and ethical extras. What’s more, the Barcelo group is renowned for its comfy king-sized beds, so you’re almost guaranteed an unrivalled night’s sleep. You’d be forgiven for not wanting to leave the grounds, given all the impressive amenities. Grab a cocktail in Lido Beach Club, often accompanied...

title: US Coast Guard plucks stranded boater from the high seas in dramatic video
creator: Jorge Fitz-Gibbon
content: Dramatic video captures the moment a US Coast Guard chopper lifts a man stuck on a sinking boat to safety about 40 miles off the coast of Florida. The newly released footage shows a guardsman being lowered into the Gulf of Mexico from a Coast Guard helicopter around 2 p.m. Saturday far off the coast of Crystal River, according to a release . The chopper and a plane were sent out of the Coast Guard station in Clearwater after getting a distress call about a boater in a “partially submerged vessel,” the release said. The boat was taking in water through a crack in the hull, according to the agency. A rescue crew located the stranded boater and hoisted him to safety, the footage shows, with no serious injuries reported in the incident. “The distressed boater did an outstanding job by wearing his lf8ie jacked and having a marine-grade radio on board his vessel,” Coast Guard Lt. Casey Skomer said in a statement. “These items contributed to him being rescued swiftly and safely.” The boater was not identified. Last week, another Coast Guard rescue squad evacuated an injured crew member from an oil tanker off the coast of Texas and delivered him to a Galveston hospital, where he is in stable condition. Earlier in the month, the Clearwater station reported that a couple was rescued off the Florida coast after their 26-foot boat capsized 18 miles out into the Gulf.

title: At least 40 people are missing after a boat capsizes in Nigeria, authorities say
creator: The Canadian Press
content: ABUJA, Nigeria (AP) — At least 40 people have drowned in a boat accident on a river in northwest Nigeria, said President Bola Tinubu on Sunday. The accident happened in Zamfara state, as farmers were trying to get to their land, said Tinubu in a statement. The president promised support for the victims and directed emergency agencies to assess the incident. Yazid Abubakar, a police spokesperson in Zamfara, told The Associated Press the accident happened on Saturday and that five people were rescued, but 40 are still missing. It was not immediately clear how many people were on the boat when it went down. The Associated Press

title: Vance doesn't back away from false claims about migrants in Ohio even amid threats to the community
content: WASHINGTON -- Republican vice presidential candidate JD Vance did not back away on Sunday from the false claims he and Donald Trump have been making that Haitians in an Ohio community are abducting and eating pets, even as the state's GOP governor and other officials insist there is no evidence of such behavior. Vance, an Ohio senator, said constituents in Springfield are bringing concerns to him and that at least 10 were “verifiable.” In a series of news show interviews, he said he was amplifying the claims as a way to draw attention to Democrat Kamala Harris' immigration policies, which he said are lax, while adding, "Everybody who has dealt with a large influx of migration knows that sometimes there are cultural practices that seem very far out there to a lot of Americans.” Local and state officials have said the claims are untrue, wrongly cast the city in a negative light and have brought unwanted and frightening negative attention since Trump mentioned it in the presidential debate last week, when he called out Springfield by name. For two days straight, bomb threats prompted the evacuation of schools and government buildings, with some emailed threats referencing an influx of migrants into the community. But it wasn’t just Springfield officials who were refuting the claims. Gov. Mike DeWine, R-Ohio, said Sunday that “there’s a lot of garbage on the internet and, you know, this is a piece of garbage that was simply not true. There’s no evidence of this at all.” He went...

title: الأردن: بعد تكليف جعفر حسان بتشكيل حكومة جديدة..إليكم سيرته الذاتية
content: دبي، الإمارات العربية المتحدة ( CNN )-- كلف العاهل الأردني، الملك عبدالله الثاني، الأحد، الدكتور جعفر حسان بتشكيل حكومة جديدة ، خلفا لحكومة الدكتور بشر الخصاونة، التي قبل استقالتها، إليكم السيرة الذاتية لرئيس الحكومة المكلف. اسمه جعفر عبد عبدالفتاح حسّان من موالد عام 1968، هو سياسي ووزير أردني سابق عمل في عدّة مناصب، شملت وزير التخطيط والتعاون الدولي بين (2009 - 2013) ومدير مكتب الملك عبدالله الثاني (2014 – 2018)، وشغل منصب نائب رئيس الوزراء وزير دولة للشؤون الاقتصادية في 2018، ليعود مديرا لمكتب الملك عبدالله الثاني بين عامي (2021-2024)، وهو مؤلف كتاب: "الاقتصاد السياسي الأردني - بناء في رحم الأزمات". وبحسب ما أفادت وكالة الأنباء الأردنية "بترا" حول السيرة الذاتية لجعفر حسان، فقد "تلقى دراسته في مدرسة المطران في عمان التي تخرج منها عام 1985، وأكمل دراسته الجامعية في فرنسا وسويسرا والولايات المتحدة، حيث حصل على شهادة البكالوريوس وشهادات الماجستير والدكتوراة". وهو متزوج ولديه ثلاثة أطفال، ووالده عبد عبدالفتاح حسان الدنادنة من مواليد خريبة السوق (1921-1990 ). وحصل رئيس الوزراء المكلف على العديد من الشهادات العلمية، منها شهادتي الدكتوراة والماجستير في العلوم السياسية والاقتصاد الدولي من المعهد الأعلى للدراسات الدولية والتنموية بجامعة جنيف بسويسرا، وشهادة الماجستير في الإدارة العامة من جامعة هارفارد-كمبريدج بالولايات المتحدة، وشهادة الماجستير في العلاقات الدولية من جامعة بوسطن بالولايات المتحدة، وشهادة البكالوريوس في العلاقات الدولية من الجامعة الأمريكية في باريس، حسبما أوردت وكالة الأنباء الأردنية "بترا". وتم تعيينه ملحقا في وزارة الخارجية الأردنية عام...

title: Hochwasser in Ost- und Mitteleuropa: «Eine sehr dramatische Situation»
content: Nach tagelangem Dauerregen wird die Hochwasserlage nicht nur in Österreich , sondern auch in anderen ost- und mitteleuropäischen Staaten zunehmend dramatisch. Mindestens sechs Menschen sind bis Sonntagnachmittag in den Wassermassen ums Leben gekommen, Tausende mussten ihre Häuser und Wohnungen verlassen. Ein Überblick über die Lage: In Tschechien appellierte Regierungschef Petr Fiala an die Bürger, den Anweisungen der Einsatzkräfte zu folgen. Manche Menschen weigerten sich, ihre Wohnungen oder Häuser zu verlassen. «Damit gefährden Sie nicht nur sich selbst, sondern auch die Menschen, die dann versuchen müssen, Sie zu retten, wenn es dramatisch wird», sagte Fiala dem Fernsehsender CT. Wer glaube, dass die präventiven Massnahmen unnötig seien, der irre. In Opava an der Grenze zu Polen musste die Feuerwehr mit Booten ausrücken, um in einer überfluteten Plattenbausiedlung Zurückgebliebene zu retten. Andernorts warteten Menschen auf Dächern auf Hilfe. Mindestens vier Menschen galten am Sonntag als vermisst. «Wir müssen damit rechnen, dass das Schlimmste noch nicht hinter uns liegt», warnte Fiala. Im Südwesten Polens brach unterdessen ein Staudamm . Nachdem das Bauwerk im niederschlesischen Stronie Slaskie nachgegeben habe, ströme das Wasser den Fluss Biala Lądecka hinunter und nehme Kurs auf das Gebiet der Glatzer Neisse, teilte das Meteorologische Institut auf der Plattform X mit. Es sei eine «ernste Bedrohung». Die Polizei habe einen Rettungshelikopter in...

title: সংসদ সচিবালয়, স্বাস্থ্য শিক্ষায় নতুন সচিব
content: পরিসংখ্যান ও তথ্য ব্যবস্থাপনা বিভাগে সংযুক্ত অতিরিক্ত সচিব ড. মো. আনোয়ার উল্ল্যাহকে পদোন্নতি দিয়ে বাংলাদেশ জাতীয় সংসদ সচিবালয়ের সচিব হিসেবে নিয়োগ দিয়েছে সরকার। অন্যদিকে বাংলাদেশ অর্থনৈতিক অঞ্চল কর্তৃপক্ষ (বেজা)-এর নির্বাহী চেয়ারম্যান (সচিব) ডা. মো: সারোয়ার বারীকে স্বাস্থ্য শিক্ষা ও পরিবার কল্যাণ বিভাগের সচিব করা হয়েছে। রবিবার জনপ্রশাসন মন্ত্রণালয়ের উপসচিব মিঞা মুহাম্মদ আশরাফ ফরিদী স্বাক্ষরিত পৃথক দুটি প্রজ্ঞাপনে এ তথ্য জানানো হয়েছে। পৃথক প্রজ্ঞাপনে নার্সিং ও মিডওয়াইফারি অধিদপ্তরের মহাপরিচালক (অতিরিক্ত সচিব) মাকসুরা নূরকে জনপ্রশাসন মন্ত্রণালয়ের বিশেষ ভারপ্রাপ্ত কর্মকর্তা (ওএসডি) করা হয়েছে। (ঢাকাটাইমস/১৫সেপ্টেম্বর/এমআর)

title: পুনর্গঠিত চলচ্চিত্র সেন্সর বোর্ডের সদস্য হলেন যারা
content: প্রবল গণ-আন্দোলনের মুখে আওয়ামী লীগ সরকারে পতনের পর সংস্কারের ছোঁয়া লেগেছে দেশের প্রতিটি গুরুত্বপূর্ণ প্রতিষ্ঠান ও সংগঠনে। সেই ধারাবাহিকতায় এবার পুনর্গঠিত হলো বাংলাদেশ চলচ্চিত্র সেন্সর বোর্ড। রবিবার তথ্য ও সম্প্রচার মন্ত্রণালয়ের উপসচিব সাইফুল ইসলাম স্বাক্ষরিত এক প্রজ্ঞাপনের মাধ্যমে নতুন কমিটির তথ্য জানানো হয়। রাষ্ট্রপতির আদেশক্রমে তথ্য মন্ত্রণালয়ের সচিবকে চেয়ারম্যান এবং সেন্সর বোর্ডের ভাইস চেয়ারম্যানকে সদস্য সচিব করে নতুন এই কমিটি গঠন করা হয়েছে। প্রজ্ঞাপনে অনুযায়ী, সেন্সর বোর্ডের ১৫ সদস্যের অন্যান্য সদস্যরা হলেন— আইন ও বিচার বিভাগের সচিব, প্রধান উপদেষ্টার প্রেস সচিব, তথ্য ও সম্প্রচার মন্ত্রণালয়ের অতিরিক্ত সচিব (চলচ্চিত্র), জননিরাপত্তা বিভাগের প্রতিনিধি, বিএফডিসির ব্যবস্থাপনা পরিচালক, চলচ্চিত্র পরিচালক সমিতির সভাপতি। এছাড়াও রয়েছেন চলচ্চিত্র নির্মাতা জাকির হোসেন রাজু, খিজির হায়াত খান, তাসমিয়া আফরিন মৌ, কাজী নওশাবা আহমেদ (অভিনেত্রী), আশফাক নিপুণ, মোহাম্মদ নাজিম উদ্দিন (বিশিষ্ট লেখক), রফিকুল আনোয়ার রাসেল (প্রযোজক ও পরিচালক)। (ঢাকাটাইমস/১৫সেপ্টেম্বর/এলএম/এমআর)

title: Bereits zwei Niederlagen: 1. FC Köln gerät früh in der Saison unter Druck
creator: Tobias Carspecken
content: Nach dem Chancenwucher beim 1:2 gegen den 1. FC Magdeburg können sich die Geißböcke vorerst keine weiteren Rückschläge erlauben. Leart Pacarada hat in seiner Karriere schon so manches erlebt. Die Begegnungen, zu denen es nach der 1:2 (0:0)-Heimniederlage gegen den 1. FC Magdeburg gekommen war, hatten aber selbst für den 252-fachen Zweitliga-Profi des 1. FC Köln Seltenheitswert. „Wenn drei, vier Leute von Magdeburg nach dem Spiel auf einen zukommen und sich entschuldigen, dass sie das Spiel gewonnen haben, dann spricht das Bände“, sagte Pacarada am Ende eines der eigenartigsten Fußballspiele der vergangenen Jahre in Müngersdorf. Trotz erdrückender Dominanz, die sich in 33:9 Torschüssen, 17:6 Flanken und 10:2 Ecken widerspiegelte, waren die Hausherren als eigentlich nicht zu erklärender Verlierer aus dem Topspiel des fünften Zweitliga-Spieltags herausgegangen. „Es war ein extrem dominantes Spiel. Wir kommen zu Riesenchancen. Wenn die Dinger reingehen, stehe ich hier und ihr gratuliert mir alle“, konnte es Pacarada auch in der Mixed Zone noch nicht so recht wahrhaben. Stattdessen mussten die Geißböcke im dritten Heimspiel der Saison bereits die zweite Niederlage hinnehmen. Das Muster ähnelte auf fatale Art und Weise dem 1:2 zum Auftakt gegen den Hamburger SV sowie dem folgenden 2:2 bei der SV Elversberg. In allen drei Partien hatte sich Gerhard Strubers Mannschaft durch frühes Attackieren reihenweise Chancen herausgespielt, beim Torabschluss jedoch eklatante...

title: Colts Star Defender Will Play vs Packers After Being Listed as Questionable
content: The Indianapolis Colts will have one of their biggest stars on the field when they take on the Green Bay Packers today. Defensive end DeForest Buckner will play today after being listed as questionable with a back injury. NFL insider Tom Pelissero reported the news on social media. DT DeForest Buckner, who was listed as questionable with a back injury, is active vs. Green Bay.

title: جامعة القاهرة تستقبل طلابها الجدد بالكشف الطبي الشامل
content: وأعلنت جامعة القاهرة، الجدول الزمني لإجراء الكشف الطبي على طلابها الجدد الحاصلين على الثانوية العامة والملتحقين بكليات الجامعة للعام الدراسي الجديد 2024 - 2025، حيث من المقرر أن يبدأ الكشف الطبي اليوم الاثنين الموافق 16 سبتمبر الجاري ويستمر حتى منتصف شهر أكتوبر المقبل. وأوضح الدكتور محمد سامي عبد الصادق رئيس الجامعة، أن الكشف الطبي سوف يتم وفق جدول زمني محدد لكل كلية، وتقسيم طلاب الكليات ذات الأعداد الكبيرة إلى مجموعات منعًا للتكدس ووفقًا للإجراءات الاحترازية التي تتبعها الجامعة حرصًا على سلامة الطلاب. ووجه رئيس جامعة القاهرة، بضرورة توفير كافة سبُل الراحة للطلاب الجُدد أثناء الكشف الطبي، وتقديم كافة التسهيلات الممكنة وتذليل العقبات التي تقابلهم، وتعدد عيادات الكشف، وتخصيص أماكن مغطاة لاستقبال الطلاب منعًا للتكدس، مع التشديد على الالتزام بكافة إجراءات وإرشادات الأمن والسلامة والمعايير الوقائية، لافتًا إلى أن الجامعة تُنشئ ملفًا صحيًا لكل طالب مستجد لمتابعة حالته الصحية طوال دراسته بالجامعة، وذلك في إطار سعي جامعة القاهرة إلى توفير أقصى درجات الحماية والوقاية لأبنائها، والحرص على مستقبلهم وسلامتهم. ومن جانبه أوضح الدكتور أحمد رجب نائب رئيس الجامعة لشؤون التعليم والطلاب، أن على الطلاب الجدد الدخول على الموقع الإلكتروني المخصص للكشف الطبي من خلال الرابط المخصص https://www.medcheck.cu.edu.eg وتسجيل بياناتهم، ومعرفة الأوراق المطلوب إحضارها معهم في اليوم المخصص لهم وهي: إثبات الشخصية (الرقم القومي) أو شهادة الميلاد المميكنة، وصورة من استمارة النجاح بالثانوية العامة، بالإضافة إلى طباعة استمارة الكشف الطبي من الموقع، وسداد رسوم الكشف الطبي في...

title: عامل دايت.. نصائح لتناول حلوى المولد وأنت محافظ على نظامك
content: وحول ذلك أوضح الدكتورنجيب إسحاق استشاري السمنة والنحافة في كلية طب قنا، أن حلاوة لمولد تحتوي علي نسبة عالية من السعرات الحرارية، والسكريات، التي يمكن أن تتسبب في فشل الحميات الغذائية الهادفة لإنقاص الوزن، ولكن هناك بعض النصائح التي يمكن القيام بها لتناول حلاوة المولد دون لخبطة حميتك الغذائية ومنها: - تناول نوعا واحدا من حلوى المولد ولا تتناول أكثر من قطعة واحدة علي مدار اليوم. -ينصح بتناول قطعة صغيرة من حلوى المولد لمتبعي الحميات الغذائية الهادفة بعد وجبة الإفطار في الصباح بساعتين، وهذا لأن تناولها في الصباح يسهم ويساعد في حرق المزيد من الدهون بالجسم. -تناول الشاى الأخضر بعد الحلويات مباشرة أو كوب من الماء عليه عصرة ليمون قبل تناولها تعد من الحيل الجيدة التي تقلل فرص التعرض لزيادة الوزن. 6 -في حالة اتباع الحمية الغذائية للتخلص من الوزن الزائد، فعليك عدم تناول النشويات والفواكه طوال اليوم الذي تناولت فيه حلاوة المولد، ومع ضرورة تناول الخضروات واللحوم المشوية خالية الدهون. -تناول المياه بكميات أكبر من المعتاد على مدار اليوم، وذلك لتجنب تخزين الدهون والسكريات في الجسم.

title: Vance doesn't back away from false claims about migrants in Ohio even amid threats to the community
creator: The Canadian Press
content: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican vice presidential candidate did not back away on Sunday from the false claims he and have been making that Haitians in an are abducting and eating pets, even as the state's GOP governor and other officials insist there is no evidence of such behavior. Vance, an Ohio senator, said constituents in Springfield are bringing concerns to him and that at least 10 were “verifiable.” In a series of news show interviews, he said he was amplifying the claims as a way to draw attention to Democrat Kamala Harris' immigration policies, which he said are lax, while adding, "Everybody who has dealt with a large influx of migration knows that sometimes there are cultural practices that seem very far out there to a lot of Americans.” Local and state officials have said the claims are untrue, wrongly cast the city in a negative light and have brought unwanted and frightening negative attention since Trump last week, when he called out Springfield by name. For two days straight, and government buildings, with some emailed threats referencing an influx of migrants into the community. But it wasn’t just Springfield officials who were refuting the claims. Gov. Mike DeWine, R-Ohio, said Sunday that “there’s a lot of garbage on the internet and, you know, this is a piece of garbage that was simply not true. There’s no evidence of this at all.” He went on to say: “Let me tell you what we do know, though. What we know is that the Haitians who are in Springfield are legal....

Gaziantep’te göçmen kaçakçılığına 1 tutuklama
content: GAZİANTEP’te jandarma ekiplerinin yol kontrolü sırasında aracında kaçak göçmenlerle birlikte yakalanan M.A., sevk edildiği mahkeme tarafından tutuklandı. İl Jandarma Komutanlığı ekipleri, göçmen kaçakçılığı yapan kişilere yönelik yürütülen çalışma kapsamında, düzensiz göçmenlerin Gaziantep’ten başka bir ile götürüleceği ihbarı üzerine Nurdağı İlçe girişinde uygulama noktası oluşturuldu. Ekipler durdurdukları araçta yabancı uyruklu göçmenleri taşıyan M.A.'yı gözaltına alındı. Jandarmadaki yasal sürecin ardında adliyeye sevk edilen şüpheli M.A. tutuklanarak cezaevine konuldu. Göçmenler ise Göçmen geri gönderme merkezine götürüldü.

title: Akshay Kumar and Twinkle Khanna celebrate son Aarav Bhatia’s 22nd birthday with heartfelt posts: 'Words can’t do justice...'
content: Akshay Kumar and Twinkle Khanna ’s son Aarav Kumar is celebrating his 22nd birthday today. To mark the special occasion, The doting parents took to their Instagram in separate posts, and sent their best wishes to Aarav on his special day. Akshay shared a bright and joyful photo from a family vacation. The sunlit picture, taken during a safari trip, features Akshay, his wife Twinkle Khanna, and their son Aarav enjoying the outdoor setting. Along with the photo, Akshay wrote a heartfelt message for Aarav, expressing how proud he is of his son’s growth into a kind and loving person. In his Instagram post, Akshay wrote, “Happy Birthday Aarav! Watching you grow into the kind and loving person you are fills my heart with pride every single day. Words can’t do justice to how much joy you bring into my life. May this year bring you as much happiness as you give to everyone around you. Love you always ❤️.” Twinkle Khanna, being a writer, was more elaborate in her post as she shared how despite leaving home for studies, Aarav still lives in their hearts, diametrically opposite to what she thought would happen once he goes abroad. She wrote, “Happy birthday Aarav. When I used to listen to you repeatedly tell me how much you were looking forward to your independence, I would feel that when you finally leave my home and step into your own, my lights will go off automatically and my world will be filled with a bleak darkness. When you would return for a visit, I would light numerous diyas...

title: Paris Jackson is a glittering goddess in fitted dress for star-studded party in London
creator: Georgia Brown
content: Paris Jackson was amongst a glittering fleet of stars to grace the British Vogue and Rabanne party to celebrate London Fashion Week on Saturday night. The singer, who is the daughter of the late Michael Jackson , proved her fashion status by sporting a terracotta-hued tube dress adorned with all-over crystals. Paris, 26, paired her demure column dress with towering gold heels and a silver bag dripping in chainmail fringing. Her hair was worn loose and waved to suit her typical rocker aesthetic, whilst the star elevated her natural features with a golden bronzer, fluffy brow and romantic bronze-hued eye look. Over on Instagram, Paris delighted her 5.2 million followers with a behind-the-scenes look at her time in London over Fashion Week. In one playful photograph, the singer was seen hand feeding pigeons, while another snap showed Paris indulging in an afternoon tea. "Glad you're having such an awesome time there, Paris," gushed a fan in the comments, as another penned: "I knew it was London! Hyde Park, one of my favourite places!" The style maven is no stranger to a star-studded front row, having firmly cemented her sartorial status as worthy of a coveted 'FROW' seat at many worldwide fashion shows. The Swarm actress only recently flitted to London from New York, where she rocked a head-turning tartan ensemble at the Off-White runway. She was seated in good company for the occasion, spotted sitting next to her music maven bestie Camila Cabello who sported a sultry black...

title: Salvage efforts to rescue stricken Red Sea tanker Sounion makes 'slow' progress after oil ship was hit by Houthi missiles
content: Salvage efforts to rescue stricken Red Sea tanker Sounion makes 'slow' progress after oil ship was hit by Houthi missiles By Taryn Pedler Published: 16:43 BST, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 16:57 BST, 15 September 2024 e-mail View comments The rescue mission of stricken Red Sea tanker Sounion is reportedly making slow progress after the oil ship was targeted by Houthi missiles. The towing of the abandoned tanker which was struck by the Yemen rebels last month is proceeding slowly in its second day, according to a Greek military source. The operation which began Saturday 'is proceeding at a very slow pace', the source said, adding that it was 'initially headed north' without revealing a destination. The tanker was hit on August 21 by Iran-backed Houthis with small arms fire, missiles and a drone boat off the coast of Hodeida while carrying 136,000 tonnes of crude oil - setting off blasts that put the Red Sea at risk of a major oil spill four times the size of the 1989 Exxon Valdez disaster off Alaska . After the initial strike, the Houthis returned and detonated charges on the ship's deck, setting off new fires. Explosions took place on the deck of the Greek-flagged oil tanker Sounion on the Red Sea last month but the rescue mission is reportedly making slow progress The Iranian-backed Houthi militant group detonated explosives on the oil tanker MT SOUNION off the coast of Yemen on August 19 The operation is being overseen by the European Union 's Red Sea naval mission,...

title: The most important information about the Austrian flood disaster in English
content: A destroyed bridge in Böheimkirchen APA/HELMUT FOHRINGER Austria is affected by heavy rainfall and flooding. All of Lower Austria was declared a disaster area, Vienna is also experiencing an exceptional situation. Fire departments are in constant operation, several residents had to be rescued from houses. Numerous roads were closed, train and subway services were partially suspended.

title: ‘Beetlejuice Beetlejuice’ is No. 1 again; conservative doc ‘Am I Racist’ cracks box office top 5
creator: Associated Press
content: Moviegoers said yes to more “ ” this weekend. After its , the Tim Burton sequel easily topped the domestic box office charts again with $51.6 million in ticket sales, according to studio estimates Sunday. Down only 54% from a week earlier, the North American gross for the Warner Bros. release is already at $188 million. Internationally, it added $28.7 million, bringing its worldwide total to a staggering $264.3 million. While its hold was strong, “Beetlejuice Beetlejuice” didn’t have much in the way of major new competition. Fresh offerings included the James McAvoy horror “ ,” a satirical documentary following right wing podcaster Matt Walsh; and a new Dave Bautista action pic, “The Killer's Game.” Second place in weekend ticket sales went to “ ,” a remake of a 2022 Danish horror film about an unsuspecting family who decides to spend a weekend with new friends in the country. McAvoy stars in it, along with Mackenzie Davis and Scoot McNairy. With positive reviews and a shrewd release date of Friday the 13th, the Blumhouse production released by Universal Pictures made an estimated $11.5 million from 3,375 locations. “ ” landed in third place in its eighth weekend with another $5.2 million. The Disney and Marvel blockbuster is now up to $621.5 million in North America and $1.3 billion globally. The Daily Wire movie “Am I Racist?” placed fourth at the box office, with an estimated $4.7 million from only 1,517 theaters. Described as a mockumentary in the style of “Borat,” the...

Pekcan Koşar: Türk Tiyatrosunun Öncüsü
creator: Anadolu Ajansı
content: Pekcan Koşar'ın Hayatı ve Kariyeri Pekcan Koşar , 11 Nisan 1936 tarihinde İstanbul'da dünyaya geldi. 19 yıl önce, 2005 yılında 69 yaşında hayatını kaybetti. Tiyatroya İlk Adım Güzel Sanatlar Akademisi'nden mezun olduktan sonra, amatör tiyatro çalışmalarına yönelen Koşar, 1955 yılında Küçük Sahne 'de sergilenen "Çayhane" adlı oyunla profesyonel oyunculuğa geçiş yaptı. Seslendirme ve Tiyatro Kariyeri Ünlü seslendirme eğitmenleri Agah Hün ve Vala Önengüt'ten dersler aldı. Ardından Oda Tiyatrosu 'nda, "Misafir", "Gökteki Kaldırımlar", "Öteki", "Tapılacak Kadın" gibi önemli oyunlarda sahne aldı. Lale Oraloğlu Tiyatrosu'nda da saat 6 temsillerinde yer aldı. Gong Tiyatrosu ve Seslendirme Çalışmaları 1961 yılında Gong Tiyatrosu 'nu kurarak Türk tiyatrosuna büyük katkılarda bulundu. Ayrıca, "Hababam Sınıfı" serisinde Tarık Akan ve Ahmet Arıman'ın, "Selvi Boylum Al Yazmalım" filminde ise Kadir İnanır'ın seslendirmelerini yaptı. Vefatı ve Mirası Pekcan Koşar, 16 Eylül 2005'te Yalova'nın Çınarcık ilçesindeki yazlık evinde hayatını kaybetti. Cenazesi, Zincirlikuyu Mezarlığı 'na defnedildi. Koşar'ın unutulmaz eserleri arasında "Çayhane", "Gökteki Kaldırımlar", "Misafir" gibi tiyatro oyunları ve "Yaz Evi", "Mutlu Günler", "Ruhsar" dizileri ile "Lejyon Dönüşü", "Kocamın Nişanlısı" gibi film projeleri bulunmaktadır.

title: Česi zažívajú pre povodne dopravné peklo, uzavretých je množstvo ciest aj železničných tratí
creator: Andrej Bančanský
content: je v Česku pre extrémne zlá. Český minister dopravy vyzýva, aby ľudia pokiaľ možno zostali radšej doma. Informuje o tom spravodajský web . „ ,“ apeluje na verejnosť minister dopravy . Odložiť cesty tiež prostredníctvom siete X odporúča Ústredná povodňová komisia. „ ,“ povedal hovorca českého Riaditeľstva ciest a diaľnic Jan Rýdl. Najpostihnutejšou časťou Česka sú regióny miest Jeseník, Olomouc a Ostrava, kde voda čiastočne zaplavila aj diaľnicu D1. Pre extrémne počasie sa v Českej republike neoplatí ani cestovanie vlakom. Uzavretých je približne 40 tratí. Napríklad železničný koridor Praha-Ostrava zaplavila voda pri meste Studénka. Pre popadané stromy na koľajnice vlaky nemôžu prejsť tiež medzi Jihlavou a Brnom či cez Havlíčkův Brod.

title: Death toll rises as rain and flooding force evacuations across central Europe
content: Another night of torrential rains pounding central Europe forced mass evacuations as the death toll rose on Sunday. Several central European nations have already been hit by severe flooding – including Austria, the Czech Republic, Poland and Romania – while Slovakia and Hungary might come next, as a result of a low pressure system from northern Italy dumping record rainfall in the region since Thursday. The floods have claimed five lives in Romania, one each in Austria and Poland. In the Czech Republic, four people who were swept away by waters were missing, police said. Most parts of the Czech Republic have been affected as authorities declared the highest flood warnings at around 100 places across the country. But the situation was worst in two north-eastern regions that recorded the biggest rainfall in recent days, including the Jeseniky mountains near the Polish border. In the city of Opava, up to 10,000 people out of a population of around 56,000 have been asked to leave their homes for higher ground. Rescuers used boats to transport people to safety in a neighbourhood flooded by the raging Opava River. “There’s no reason to wait,” mayor Tomas Navratil told Czech public radio. He said that the situation was worse than during the last devastating floods in 1997, known as the “flood of the century”. “We have to focus on saving lives,” Prime Minister Petr Fiala told Czech public television on Sunday. His government was set to meet on Monday to assess the damages. The worst...

content: خالد بن سعد الشنفري بدأت آليات ومُعدات الطرق تزمجر على جوانب شوارع السلطان قابوس والسلطان تيمور والفاروق، لتُذكِّرُنا بزخم فترات السبعينيات والثمانينيات والتسعينيات من القرن الماضي في مسيرة نهضتنا الحديثة، ورغم أنَّ هذه المشاريع قد تتسبب في بطء حركة السير في هذه المناطق، بعد أن بدأنا نشعر بأنَّ شوارعنا أصبحت لنا ولم يعد يشغلها غيرنا من زائرينا الكرام ونعتصم نحن ببيوتنا قدر الإمكان، إلّا أننا نتقبل ذلك بسعادة وبهجة، لأنَّ الانتهاء من ازدواجية هذه الشوارع الثلاثة مع حلول موسم الخريف المقبل سيُخفِّف ازدحامًا قد لا نتوقع كَنهَهُ اليوم مع هذه الزيادة السنوية المضطردة لزوار خريفنا في كل عام. شارع السلطان قابوس أقدم وأطول الشوارع التي تم رصفها في المحافظة يضج في موسم الخريف بأعداد هائلة من السيارات التي تزور أكشاك النارجيل المنتشرة على جوانبه من الحافة غربًا إلى الدهاريز شرقًا؛ وتلك التي تزور أيضًا سوق شاطئ الحافة للبخور والعطور وسوق اللبان وقصر الحصن العامر وشاطئ الدهاريز وواجهته الحديثة. أما عن شارعي السلطان تيمور والفاروق، فحدِّث ولا حرج؛ فشارع السلطان تيمور نصف دائري حول منطقة السعادة وقد أصبحت اليوم بحق مركزًا تجاريًا وثقافيًا رئيسًا في المحافظة، وشارع الفاروق الذي يتوسط منطقة صحلنوت النامية باضطراد سريع، وبعد أن حصد هذا الشارع العديد من الأرواح طوال السنوات القليلة الماضية، آن الأوان أن يصبح مزدوجًا. مع جزيل شكرنا وامتناننا لكل من ساهم في هذا الإنجاز ولو جاء متأخرًا جدًا، إلّا أننا نقول لا يصلح العطار ما أفسده الدهر، ولن تجب هذه الشوارع الهوة الزمنية الطويلة التي توقف فيها الاهتمام بالطرق عمومًا في المحافظة، رغم تزايد وتيرة نمو السكان من...

title: Απόλλων-ΑΕΛ: Στον... αέρα το ντέρμπι – Η απαίτηση της Αστυνομίας για να αρχίσει το παιχνίδι
creator: Αντρέας Τζιακουρής
content: Σημαντική εξέλιξη προκύπτει λίγα λεπτά πριν την έναρξη του ντέρμπι ανάμεσα σε Απόλλωνα και ΑΕΛ στο «Άλφαμεγα». Σύμφωνα με την πληροφόρηση που έχουμε, η Αστυνομία κάλεσε σε σύσκεψη τις δύο ομάδες για να συζητήσουν το θέμα που προέκυψε με την είσοδο φιλάθλων της ΑΕΛ στην κερκίδα των φιλοξενουμένων, χωρίς εισιτήριο. 18:53 (UPDATE) Σύμφωνα με την νεότερη ενημέρωση, οι αρχές του σταδίου εξέδωσαν ανακοίνωση από τα μεγάφωνα του γηπέδου και καλούν όσους εισήλθαν παράνομά να αποχωρήσουν, αλλιώς το παιχνίδι δεν θα αρχίσει. title: Trump says ‘I HATE TAYLOR SWIFT’ in all-caps Truth Social post
creator: Andrea Cavallier
content: Former president Donald Trump went off on Taylor Swift online as he declared that he hates the singer, days after she endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris . He posted “I HATE TAYLOR SWIFT” in all caps on his Truth Social platform on Sunday morning. Last week, Swift endorsed Harris just after the presidential debate. “I will be casting my vote for Kamala Harris and Tim Walz in the 2024 Presidential Election,” Swift wrote in an Instagram post. Her call for voter registration drove more than 400,000 visitors to the vote.gov website in under 24 hours.

title: 60 liralık sigaranın 52 lirası vergi
content: Cumhurbaşkanı Kararı ile Resmi Gazete'de yayımlanarak yürürlüğe giren sigara üzerindeki özel tüketim vergisi (ÖTV) oranları ve maktu vergi tutarlarında değişikliklere gidildi. Kararla sigaraların ÖTV oranlarında indirim yapıldı, maktu verdi tutarları artırıldı. Sigara üzerindeki nispi özel tüketim vergisi oranı yüzde 57'den yüzde 53,5'e indirildi, paket başına alınan maktu vergi tutarı 5,7424 liradan 7,8 liraya çıkarıldı. Vergi Uzmanı Dr. Ozan Bingöl, dün yapılan ÖTV düzenlemesiyle sigaradaki vergi oranını hesapladı. Buna göre; satış fiyatı 60 lira olan bir paket sigaranın 51,85 lirası, satış fiyatı 70 lira olan bir paket sigaranın 56,91 lirası, satış fiyatı 80 lira olan bir paket sigaranın 63,93 lirası vergilerden oluşuyor.

title: Небесно зрелище! Задават се епични астрономически събития до края на септември
content: Септемврийската суперлуна изгрява в средата на месеца NASA сподели официалните дати на дългоочакваните астрономически събития от септември. Този месец нощното небе ще изглежда изумително и най-хубавото е, че за разлика от слънчевите затъмнения не е необходимо специално оборудване, за да се насладите на чудесата на нощта. Септемврийската суперлуна изгрява в средата на месеца, докато при частичното лунно затъмнение ще изглежда, че някой е взел парче от нея. Освен това луната ще си проправи път близо до Плеядите, наричани още Седемте сестри. Жътвената Луна е традиционно име за пълнолуние в края на лятото и началото на есента в Северното полукълбо, обикновено през септември и октомври. Жътвената Луна е пълнолунието, което е най-близо до есенното равноденствие, настъпващо в рамките на две седмици преди или след тази дата. "Луната на ловеца" е пълнолунието след него. Венера луната ще бъде разположена ниско в небето на запад след залез през целия септември. Сатурн ще се вижда през цялата нощ. Юпитер и Марс ще изгреят няколко часа след полунощ и могат да бъдат наблюдавани на югоизток преди изгрев слънце. На 16 септември наблюдателите трябва да погледнат към югоизточния ъгъл на небето след залез слънце, за да видят как луната води Сатурн през небесната сфера. Следващият ден, 17 септември, бележи настъпването на пълна жътвена луна, която също се квалифицира като суперлуна. Това ще бъде придружено от частично лунно затъмнение. По време на затъмнението НАСА отбелязва, че луната ще...

title: Transcript: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Sept. 15, 2024
content: The following is a transcript of an interview with Maryland Gov. Wes Moore, a Democrat, on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that aired on Sept. 15, 2024. MARGARET BRENNAN: And we're joined now by Maryland Democratic Governor, Wes Moore. He's a member of the Harris campaign's National Advisory Board. Governor, I have a lot to get to with you, but I want to start on where we left the conversation with the senator from Ohio, JD Vance. He argues that talking about this strain on the local community from migrant populations should not be dismissed as racist by the Harris campaign, and should be discussed on its merits, merits. What do you make of the continued push to focus the conversation here? GOV. WES MOORE: Well, I mean, there's a remarkable amount of not just inaccuracies, but dog whistling that we heard from that. But you know, of all the many things that I think were really problematic with what Senator Vance said when at the end of the interview, when he started talking about the just some local elected official and what they have to say. These are people who are closest to the ground. These are the people who are closest to their constituents. These are public servants, and these are partners inside the work. And in the case of that Mayor, that's a Republican who's saying that that this isn't about politics, and it's not not about politicizing this issue. We know that to be able to address these issues, and particularly big, complex issues like the border crisis...

Важно! Ще поскъпне ли природният газ? "Булгаргаз" обяви
content: Поскъпване на природния газ с 3 процента от октомври предвижда "Булгаргаз" Това става ясно от заявлението, което газовата компания е внесла в КЕВР. През следващия месец за покриване на вътрешното потребление ще се използват основно количества природен газ, доставени по дългосрочния договор с Азербайджан, както и от газохранилището в Чирен. Тъй като от 1 октомври би трябвало в търговска експлоатация да влезе терминалът в гръцкия град Александруполис, където страната ни е резервирала капацитет, се очаква оттам да бъдат доставени и количества втечнен природен газ. От "Булгаргаз" обаче посочват, че все още нямат подписано потвърждение за тези доставки с компаниите, спечелили търговете. Това означава, че може да има промяна в цените при подаването на крайното заявление на компанията в края на месеца.

title: Минимальной победой закончился матч «Ордабасы» в КПЛ
« Les haies ont été plantées pour des raisons économiques, avant d’être détruites pour de nouvelles raisons économiques »
creator: Léo Magnin, Research fellow, Centre national de la recherche scientifique (CNRS)
content: Des haies l’on connaît souvent les nombreux bienfaits pour la biodiversité comme pour une agriculture durable. On sait aussi qu’elles peuvent être l’objet de tensions entre propriétaires voisins, entre agriculteurs et décideurs publics. Le sociologue Léo Magnin nous propose désormais de découvrir « La vie sociale des haies ». Il démontre au passage comment cet objet d’étude est propice à l’examen d’un processus balbutiant et semé de contradictions : l’écologisation des mœurs. Dans cet extrait, il analyse l’évolution des haies au prisme de leurs fonctions économiques. Dans les sociétés essentiellement agricoles du Moyen Âge, les arbres sont une richesse : Norbert Elias dresse le parallèle entre, d’un côté, les prisonniers tués et, de l’autre, les arbres, les puits et les champs détruits pour affaiblir l’adversaire. On se souvient que la haie est, avec le mouvement des enclosures, un investissement qui contribue à matérialiser les bornes de la propriété privée lucrative. Dans son Théâtre d’agriculture et mesnage des champs , Olivier de Serres (1539‐1619), agronome avant la lettre, louait aussi les haies, meilleures cloisons que les murailles, fossés et palissades, parce qu’elles sont infranchissables : « Tous‐jours les Haies sont de grand service, defendans par leurs piquerons, le passage à gens & à bestes : d’autant qu’à travers ne peut‐on passer, ne par dessus aucunement monter. » Or cette fonction de préserver les cultures, vignes et...

title: Geri adım yok! KKTC Cumhurbaşkanı Tatar: İzlenen yol doğru ve haklıdır
content: Türk Ajansı Kıbrıs'ın (TAK) KKTC Cumhurbaşkanlığından yapılan açıklamaya dayandırdığı haberine göre, Tatar, Kıbrıs konusunda ortaya konulan iki devletli çözüm politikasını Kıbrıs Türk halkının çoğunluğunun ve Türkiye'nin desteklediğini belirtti. Tatar, "Kıbrıs konusundaki yeni dönem politikalarımız doğrudur, haklıdır ve hiç kuşkusuz devam ettirilerek hedefe ulaştırılacak konumdadır. Hal böyleyken kendilerinin kafa karışıklığını, çelişkilerini bizim çelişkimiz varmış gibi yansıtmaya çalışanlar hatalıdır." ifadesine yer verdi. Kıbrıs'ta iki ayrı devlet olduğunu, iki devletin işbirliğinin sağlanması ve halklarının ilişkilerini barış ve güven içinde geliştirecek bir uzlaşıya varılması gerektiğini kaydeden Tatar, Birleşmiş Milletler (BM) Genel Sekreteri Antonio Guterres'in önerisi doğrultusunda 27-29 Nisan 2021'de Kıbrıslı taraflar ve garantör ülkeler Türkiye, Yunanistan ve İngiltere'nin katılımlarıyla İsviçre'nin Cenevre kentindeki gayriresmi "5+BM" Kıbrıs konferansını hatırlattı. Bu görüşmede "eşit uluslararası statüyü ve egemen eşitliği garanti altına alan bir BM Güvenlik Konseyi Kararı alınması, ikili ilişkiler, mülkiyet, güvenlik, sınır düzenlemeleri ve Avrupa Birliği (AB) ile ilişkiler gibi konuların müzakerelerde ele alınması, tarafların birbirini tanıması, işbirliği yapması," gibi konuların yer aldığı 6 maddeden oluşan önerisine değinen Tatar, Guterres'in konuya ilişkin önerilerinin Güney Kıbrıs...

title: Finansijske istrage protiv Radoja Zvicera: Njegov kum prije likvidacije otvorio firmu u Slovačkoj, imala nultu prodaju i nije obavljala nikakvu poslovnu aktivnost
creator: urednik
content: Tamari Zvicer, supruzi Radoja Zvicera vođi kavačkog klana, prije dva dana oduzet je bijesni automobil „Audi Q8“, a protiv nje će biti podnijeta prekršajna prijava. Ovo inače, nije nikakva novina, jer se protiv žene odbjeglog šefa kotoskog klana vodi nekoliko krivičnih postupaka, kako u Crnoj Gori tako i u inostranstvu. Protiv Zvicerovih i njihove najuže porodice vode se istrage u Ukrajini, ali i u Slovačkoj zbog finansija i pranja para. Pa tako slovački mediji navode, da je pokojni pomorac Marko Vuković, kum Radoja Zvicera sedam dana prije ubistva otvorio firmu pod nazivom „Nitra Projekt Group“, koja je kasnije preimenovana u „Akuafol Nitra“. Podsjetimo, Vuković je izrešetan 17. januara 2020. ispred škole naočigled djece i žene na Bežanijskoj kosi u Beogradu. – , odnosno 10. januara 2020. godine, prema domaćem Privrednom registru, sa nekoliko osoba sa sjedištem u porodičnoj kući u Veljke Zalužiju – navode lokalni mediji i dodaju da je posjedovao imanje u Slovačkoj. – Ako je sudeći prema dostupnim informacijama, koje se mogu videti u registru firma je za 2020. i 2021. godinu imala nultu prodaju i nije obavljala nikakvu poslovnu aktivnost. Krajem 2021. godine kompaniju preuzima novo lice i dobija ime „Akuafol Nitra.“ Kako zatim dodaju tamošnji mediji, jedan od četiri nekadašnja suvlasnika slovačke kompanije „Nitra Projekt Group“ bio je Crnogorac Stepan Krivokapić iz Kotora. – Saradnja Vukovića i Krivokapića navodno, datira od ranije i to od 2009....

title: Over 50? Here's why your foundation is making you look older - and the seven products you need to take years off your face
content: Over 50? Here's why your foundation is making you look older - and the seven products you need to take years off your face By Hannah Betts For The Daily Mail Published: 16:52 BST, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 16:56 BST, 15 September 2024 e-mail View comments Fashion week, now in full swing, has turned my mind to what's in and what's out trend-wise. Obviously, a style needs to suit you to be worth pursuing. But, a tweak here, a refresh there, keeps midlifers looking current. Plus it's a lot of fun. First, what to ditch? Matte foundation is feeling old. I've called time on any bases that feel remotely flat or 'full-coverage'. Ditto non-luminous, or tinted powder. Radiant 'skin-minimalism' is what it's about: make-up/skincare hybrids that resemble a genuine, beautifully maintained complexion. Blush is so much the thing I'd pack in bronzer too, unless you think you need a light dusting to feel human. Bold brow pencils should go; ditto any eyeliner older than six months (three if your eyes feel sensitive). As for purchases, I can suggest: 1. Cleanser If you've been lax about make-up removal over summer, now is the time to boost your routine. I've fallen for Skin Rocks The Gel Cleanser (£39, skinrocks.com) from online beauty star Caroline Hirons. It's a gel-to-oil-to-milk, fortified by a barrier-boosting, six-oil fusion. Skin feels clean and cosseted in its wake. If funds won't run to this, try The Body Shop Camomile Jelly One-Step Cleanser (£12, thebodyshop.com). 2. Lipstick...

title: Sakarya'da Makarna Fabrikasında Patlama: 30 Yaralı
creator: Anadolu Ajansı
content: Sakarya'daki Makarna Fabrikasında Patlama: 30 Yaralı Sakarya'nın Hendek ilçesinde bulunan bir makarna fabrikasında meydana gelen patlama sonucunda 30 kişi yaralandı. Olay, Anadolu Otoyolu Hendek gişeleri mevkisindeki fabrikanın silolarına bitişik alanda, henüz belirlenemeyen bir nedenden dolayı gerçekleşti ve ardından yangın çıktı. Patlama haberi alır almaz, sağlık ekipleri ve itfaiye olay yerine sevk edildi. Ayrıca AFAD, Orman Bölge Müdürlüğü ve polis ekipleri de destek sağladı. Yaralanan 30 kişi, Hendek, Akyazı, Düzce ve Kocaeli'deki hastanelere kaldırıldı. Patlama anında siloda mahsur kalan bir işçi, itfaiye ekiplerinin müdahalesiyle kurtarıldı. Yetkililer Olay Yerinde İncelemelerde Bulundu Sakarya Valisi Yaşar Karadeniz , olay yerine gelerek yapılan tahliye çalışmalarının tamamlandığını, içeride başka kimsenin bulunmadığını açıkladı. Vali Karadeniz, fabrikanın patlama bölgesinin değirmen kısmında olduğunu belirtti ve yangının söndürülmesinin ardından detaylı bir inceleme yapılacağını duyurdu. Sağlık Durumu ve Yaralılar Sağlık Bakan Yardımcısı Halim Özçevik , yaralılardan beşinin taburcu edildiğini ve ikisinin entübe olduğunu ifade etti. Ayrıca, yaralılardan birinin 12 yaşında bir çocuk olduğu belirtildi. Çocuğun babasıyla birlikte fabrikada olduğu ve yaralandığı tespit edildi. Özçevik , "Yaralılarımızın durumu genel olarak iyi, ancak birkaçının durumu kritik. Güvenlik çemberinin genişletilmesi, patlama riski...

title: Sydney Sweeney Shares Rare Photos with Fiancé Jonathan Davino During Trip to Universal Studios Hollywood
creator: People
content: The actress and Davino have been engaged since 2022 Sydney Sweeney/Instagram is giving a glimpse at life with ! On Saturday, Sept. 14, the actress, 27, shared rare photos with Davino, 41, on as the couple and their friends took a recent trip to the theme park in Universal City, Calif. "Came for @horrornights stayed for the minions," Sweeney captioned her post, in reference to the popular characters from the franchise. The first snap in the carousel, which also included fun videos from the outing, showed Sweeney posing in front of the Universal Studios arch with Davino and five of their friends. The group was dressed in merchandise in honor of the characters, with some wearing Minions t-shirts and others wearing themed hats. Though the actress typically keeps her relationship out of the public eye, she appeared to have her arm around her fiancé in the photo, with one leg raised in front of him. Next, the star posted a video with her arms wrapped around a friend as they rode down an escalator. In it, Sweeney wore an oversized white sweater with a black leather waist bag hanging from her shoulder. Another snap showed Sweeney covering her face as she sat at a table and looked at a large cake – in what appeared to be part of a belated birthday celebration as the actress turned 27 on Thursday, Sept. 12. The carousel continued with more memories from her theme park trip, during which the actress, Davino and their friends visited and -themed attractions. In one photo, she posed...

title: Carbon pricing to cause economic “nuclear winter,” Poilievre tells his MPs
creator: The Canadian Press
content: OTTAWA — Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre signaled the Liberals' carbon price and the economy will remain his prime target when Parliament resumes this week. He painted a dystopian picture during a Sunday morning speech to his caucus, saying the Liberal government’s plans to increase the price would cause a “nuclear winter” for the economy. He says further increases would cause widespread hunger and malnutrition and force seniors to turn down the heat in their homes just to stay afloat. He argues inflation would also run rampant and cause a collapse of the domestic economy. The Conservatives are the last of the major parties to have a fall strategy session after the Liberals, NDP and Bloc Québécois all met last week. Poilievre has maintained his party's commanding lead in the polls throughout the summer, and is preparing to make another push to topple the Liberal government as early as this week. All parties are adjusting their autumn plans after NDP Leader Jagmeet Singh ended the agreement that was ensuring the Prime Minister Justin Trudeau's Liberal government would stay in power. Poilievre has promised to bring in a non-confidence motion at his first opportunity, and that could happen as early as Monday. The Tories would likely need the support of both the NDP and the Bloc to pass the motion, which appears unlikely. This report by The Canadian Press was first published Sept. 15, 2024. Anja Karadeglija, The Canadian Press

title: Polski Cukier AZS UMCS wygrał przedsezonowy turniej w lubelskiej hali MOSiR im. Zdzisława Niedzieli
creator: Kamil Kozioł
content: Gospodynie miały zresztą wyjątkowo proste zadanie, bo rywalizowały z I-ligowym MOSiR Bochnia. Litwinka zdobyła aż 19 pkt. Dzielnie wspierała ją Stella Johnson. Amerykanka do dorobku zespołu dorzuciła 16 „oczek”. Poznanianki również pewnie wygrały swój półfinał z KS Basket 25 Bydgoszcz, co oznaczało, że ekipy z Lubelskiego oraz Wielkopolski zagrają w niedzielnym finale. Zgodnie z przewidywaniami mecz był bardzo zacięty, chociaż w grze obu ekip widać było, że są to jeszcze mecze o charakterze towarzyskim. Punkty bardzo często były zdobywane seriami. Pierwszą zanotowały poznanianki, ale później na przełomie pierwszej i drugiej kwarty podobną miały lublinianki. W efekcie przed ostatnią kwartą minimalnie, bo tylko o punkt, lepsze były przyjezdne. Kiedy w połowie tej odsłony Aleksandra Żukowska wyprowadziła Eneę na trzypunktowe prowadzenie, wydawało się, że to podopieczne Wojciecha Szawarskiego wygrają cały turniej. Wtedy jednak dobra postawa Aleksandry Stanacev i jej koleżanek pozwoliła odwrócić losy spotkania. . – Może nas cieszyć tylko zwycięstwo. Trafiliśmy tylko 1 z 34 rzutów za 3 pkt. Jesteśmy w ciężkim treningu, więc takie mecze mają prawo się zdarzać. Za tydzień jedziemy na turniej do Wrocławia i tam chcemy prezentować się już znacznie lepiej – zapowiada Krzysztof Szewczyk, opiekun Polskiego Cukru AZS UMCS Lublin. Miskiniene 19 (1x3), Johnson 16 (1x3), Ullmann 10 (1x3), Zempare 9, Szymkiewicz 5 oraz Trzeciak 14 (2x3), Kulińska...

title: Zelenskyy Urges West To Overcome Its 'Fear' And Let Ukraine Fire British Missiles Into Russia
creator: HuffPost UK
content: Volodymyr Zelenskyy has called on the west to overcome its “fear” and let Ukraine fire British long-range missiles into Russia. The Ukrainian president urged its allies to show “decisiveness” after Moscow launched fresh attacks on the city of Kharkiv. Posting on X, he said: “The world must help us defend ourselves against Russian military aircraft and the dozens of guided aerial bombs that claim Ukrainian lives every day. “This terror can be stopped. But to stop it, the fear of making strong, objectively necessary decisions must be overcome. Only decisiveness can bring a just end to this war. It is decisiveness that most effectively protects against terror.” A rescue operation is underway in Kharkiv following a Russian strike with aerial bombs. An ordinary residential high-rise building has been damaged. There is a fire and debris between the 9th and 12th floors. So far, nearly 30 people have been reported injured, including... — Volodymyr Zelenskyy / Володимир Зеленський (@ZelenskyyUa) His comments came after talks between Joe Biden and Keir Starmer in the White House broke up without any agreement on whether Ukraine will be allowed to use British-made Storm Shadow missiles on Russian soil. Vladimir Putin has warned that such a move would lead to war between Russia and Nato. Foreign secretary David Lammy today and insisted the UK would continue to support Ukraine. He said: “We won’t be bullied by Putin’s shameless grandstanding. “What he should now do is cease his...

title: Uber станет оператором услуг беспилотного такси Waymo в Остине и Атланте
content: Агрегатор такси Uber Technologies и разработчик ПО для беспилотного такси Waymo объявили о расширении двустороннего сотрудничества. Uber станет эксклюзивным оператором услуг беспилотного такси Waymo в американских городах Атланта и Остин. Как говорится в совместном пресс-релизе компаний, с начала 2025 года жители Остина (Техас) и Атланты (Джорджия) в приложении Uber смогут заказать автономное такси в тарифах X, Green, Comfort и Comfort Electric. Uber будет предоставлять услуги по управлению и обслуживании парка электромобилей Jaguar I-Pace, включая мойку, ремонт и другие. Waymo будет осуществлять помощь на дороге, а также отвечать за совершенствование ПО и связь с пассажирами по неотложным вопросам. Waymo и Uber объявили о сотрудничестве еще в мае 2023 года. Как напомнил гендиректор агрегатора такси Дара Хосровшахи, ранее компании совершили успешный запуск беспилотного такси в городе Финикс (Аризона) «для десятков тысяч пассажиров». Весной этого года принадлежащий Alphabet разработчик ПО для автономного такси получил разрешение на перевозки пассажиров в Калифорнии: отдельных районах Лос-Анджелеса и на полуострове Сан-Франциско. title: انطلاق "مرحبا ظفار" لترويج المزارات السياحية بالمحافظة
creator: جريدة الرؤية العمانية
content: صلالة- الرؤية تنطلق اليوم الإثنين فعالية "مرحبا ظفار" التي تنظمها وزارة التراث والسياحة بمشاركة 40 شركة سياحية سعودية و13 إعلاميًا من أبرز المؤسسات الإعلامية في المملكة. وتتضمن الفعالية تنظيم جولات ميدانية لمناطق الجذب السياحي الرئيسية، تشمل شواطئ صلالة الخلابة وجبال ظفار الخضراء والمواقع التراثية والأثرية التي تعكس عمق الحضارة والتاريخ العُماني. وتهدف فعالية "مرحبا ظفار" إلى تعزيز الحركة السياحية بمحافظة ظفار، والترويج للمقومات السياحية الفريدة التي تتميز بها المحافظة، بما في ذلك موسم "الصرب" والسياحة الشتوية. وتأتي هذه الفعالية ضمن خطة وزارة التراث والسياحة لتعزيز التواصل مع الأسواق السياحية الإقليمية، وتسليط الضوء على الفرص السياحية والتجارب المتميزة في سلطنة عمان. وستتضمن الفعالية جلسات نقاشية ولقاءات عمل ثنائية بين الشركات السياحية العُمانية والسعودية، بهدف تبادل الخبرات واستكشاف فرص التعاون في تطوير القطاع السياحي. كما ستتيح فعالية "مرحبا ظفار" للمشاركين فرصة استكشاف المقومات السياحية التي تجعل من سلطنة عُمان وجهة مثالية للمغامرات، والاسترخاء، وسياحة المؤتمرات والمعارض.

title: Le aritmie e il cardiopalmo: quando il cuore perde il ritmo
content: CREMONA - Protagonista della rubrica ‘Il medico risponde’ è direttore di «Come dice il nome stesso, aritmia, è l’assenza del ritmo del cuore. Possono essere benigne o maligne, della parte alta del cuore, quindi degli atri, o della parte bassa, ossia dei ventricoli. E hanno quindi possibilità diagnostica differente, così come terapia e prognosi. In generale è un disturbo del ritmo ed è quanto ci riferiscono i nostri pazienti. Uno spettro dunque molto ampio con caratteristiche differenti». «Le più pericolose sono quelle che insorgono nel cuore malato di pazienti che hanno avuto un’ischemia cardiaca o problemi del muscolo cardiaco o ancora alle valvole cardiache. Nella persona con una cardiopatia strutturale le aritmie nascono nella parte bassa del cuore e sono più pericolose. Non tutte le aritmie ventricolari sono comunque pericolose. Poi ci sono le aritmie sopraventricolari che pur essendo benigne possono determinare perdita di coscienza, affanno, dolore toracico e dare origine a cadute a terra». «I sintomi sono molto vaghi. La maggior parte dei pazienti con un cuore sostanzialmente sano o ammalato - giovani o anziani - viene in ambulatorio riferendo di avere le palpitazioni che possono avere una breve durata, essere ricorrenti o persistenti, in questo caso inducendo la persona a presentarsi al pronto soccorso per la diagnosi e l’individuazione di una terapia. Il sintomo prevalente quindi resta il cardiopalmo». «L’elettrocardiogramma quando il sintomo è in corso....

title: Disney+ adaptation of Jilly Cooper's bonkbuster Rivals will take 'equal opportunities' approach to nudity with a 'willy for every pair of t***', says producer
content: Disney+ adaptation of Jilly Cooper's bonkbuster Rivals will take 'equal opportunities' approach to nudity with a 'willy for every pair of t***', says producer Jilly Cooper's Rivals is set to air on Disney Plus from October 18 READ MORE: The very saucy remark about two young men Jilly Cooper whispered in my ear - and how the era of the bodice-ripping bonkbuster is back By Eleanor Dye Published: 16:52, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 16:55, 15 September 2024 e-mail View comments The Disney+ adaptation of Jilly Cooper's bonkbuster Rivals will take an 'equal opportunities' approach to nudity, according to the show's executive producer. The streaming channel has promised to bring a '2020s lens' to the 1980s classic - a notoriously politically incorrect tale of sex and scandal in the English social elite. The story focuses on the tense rivalry between Rupert Campbell-Black (Alex Hassell) and Lord Tony Baddingham (David Tennant). The racy eight-part series is set to air from October 18 - but many viewers have been left wondering how its themes would be translated for a modern audience. In an interview with The Times, writer and executive producer Dominic Treadwell-Collins, who has previously worked on EastEnders , has shed light on the much anticipated new TV seres. title: 2024 Solheim Cup Sunday singles scores: Charley Hull gives Europe big early win with rout of Nelly Korda
creator: USA TODAY Sports - Golfweek
content: It all comes down to this. The Sunday singles between the U.S. and the Europeans featured all 12 players on each side competing on the final day. The U.S. leads the all-time series 10-7-1 but hasn't won since 2017. The Americans lead this year's event 10-6 heading into the final day needing to need to earn 141⁄2 points to win back the Cup. The first match out was Nelly Korda vs. Charley Hull and the world No. 1 Korda was chasing most of the day. Tied through five holes, Hull won three consecutive holes to take a big lead through eight. title: Oscar Piastri makes typical remark as McLaren driver admits he had "50-50" chance of crashing
creator: mirrornews@mirror.co.uk (Tom Victor)
content: Oscar Piastri was brutally honest about the risk he was taking when passing Charles Leclerc en route to his Azerbaijan Grand Prix victory . Piastri made a bold move to overtake Leclerc on the inside, and was able to hold off the Monegasque to claim victory. Leclerc still made it onto the podium in second, with George Russell climbing into third after a late crash between Sergio Perez and Carlos Sainz . It brought a second win of the season for Australian driver Piastri , who also won in Hungary . Leclerc was chasing back-to-back wins after victory in Monza , but couldn't fully capitalise after qualifying on pole. The three podium finishers were seen exchanging words in the cooldown room after the race as they reflected on the action. And there was only one place to begin. "To be honest, when I hit the brakes I was like 'There's a 50-50 chance whether I make this corner or not'," Piastri said . Leclerc put on a brave face as he attempted to explain why the recovery never came. "Yeah I just broke the way I was breaking normally," the Ferrari driver admitted. "I saw you go in so I was like 'He's not going to release the brakes... okay, I'll just let him go and take the DRS and try to overtake you', and that never happened." "To be honest there were about 10 laps where I thought it was going to happen," Piastri replied. "But once I got clean air I thought 'Okay, maybe my life will be a bit easier now'." Were you impressed by the Piastri-Leclerc battle? Have your say in the...

title: Plan von RW Walldorf geht gegen die U21 des SV 98 auf
content: WALLDORF. „Uns sind heute die Grenzen aufgezeigt worden“, sagte Trainer Daniel Petrowsky: „Wir haben viel, viel Lernstoff mit nach Hause zu nehmen.“ Gerade hatte seine U21 des SV Darmstadt 98 beim SV Rot-Weiß Walldorf mit 0:3 (0:2) in der Fußball-Hessenliga verloren. Walldorf bleibt mit ihrem siebten Sieg im achten Saisonspiel erster Verfolger von Spitzenreiter FC Bayern Alzenau, den sie am kommenden Samstag (15 Uhr) in Unterfranken herausfordert. Das Walldorfer Führungstor gelang Imad Jaadar mit einem herrlichen Flugkopfball nach Flanke von Kento Takenaka (26.). Jener wieselflinke Mittelfeldspieler, der erst kurzfristig in die Startelf gekommen war, weil sich Aid Sulejmani bei der letzten Aktion seines Aufwärmprogramms verletzt hatte: Bei einem Schuss verspürte er ein Ziehen im Adduktorenbereich. Den kleinsten gemeinsamen Nenner von Sieger und Verlierer nannte Marcus Spahn, Sportlicher Leiter der Rot-Weißen: „Wir haben ein gutes Spiel gesehen. Da war viel Tempo drin.“ Petrowsky befand, seine Mannschaft habe keine Mittel gegen das Offensivpressing des Tabellenzweiten gefunden: „Wir waren bei den zweiten Bällen gefühlt immer ein, zwei Schritte langsamer. Da haben wir uns ein bisschen den Schneid abkaufen lassen.“ Genau das war der Plan des SV Rot-Weiß, machte RWW-Trainer Artur Lemm deutlich. Allerdings hatten die Lilien den besseren Start in die Begegnung der beiden jüngsten Mannschaften dieser Liga. Mateo Zelic tauchte frei vor RWW-Torhüter Denis Wieszolek auf und...
