title: Tim Sulteng Dicurangi, Erick Thohir Kirim Wasit Liga 1 Pimpin Semifinal PON Aceh-Sumut
content: Ketua Umum PSSI, , mengeluarkan instruksi agar pertandingan semifinal dan final cabor sepak bola PON Aceh-Sumut 2024 dipimpin wasit Liga 1. Pada PON 2024 ini, cabor sepak bola menggunakan wasit Liga 3. Perintah mengganti wasit dikeluarkan Erick setelah insiden pertandingan perempat final antara Aceh vs Sulteng, Sabtu (14/9/2024) kemarin Di mana, wasit Eko Agus Sugiharto yang memimpin pertandingan berpihak kepada tuan rumah Aceh. Karena ulahnya itu, Eko kena bogem mentah dari pemain Sulteng, Rizki Saputra karena memberi hadiah penalti tim tuan rumah di menit ke-90+7. Hasilnya, Rizki Saputra pun dikenai kartu merah sementara Eko Agus tidak bisa melanjutkan pertandingan karena dilarikan ke luar lapangan menggunakan ambulan. Laga yang sempat terhenti selama 20 menit pun akhirnya dilanjutkan dengan wasit pengganti. Adapun saat kembali dimulai, tim tuan rumah yang mendapatkan penalti gagal mengeksekusinya. Hingga di menit selanjutnya, Aceh kembali mendapatkan hadiah penalti setelah pemain Sulteng melakukan handsball hingga mampu menetralkan keadaan melalui skor 1-1. Namun, Sulteng yang merasa banyak dirugikan wasit menolak untuk melanjutkan pertandingan. Laga pun dimenangkan oleh Aceh skor 1-1 setelah tim lawan walkout. Kini, insiden pertandingan yang telah menjadi sorotan publik memaksa pihak PSSI turun tangan untuk memperbaiki. Arya Sinulingga, selaku Exco PSSI menerangkan, langkah-langkah yang diambil Ketum PSSI untuk pertandingan sepak bola PON 2024 yang tersisa. Pertama, PSSI...

title: Jind Crime : चरित्र संदेह के चलते पति ने पत्नी पर थिनर तेल छिड़ककर लगाई आग
creator: Anurekha Lambra
content: पुलिस ने पति के खिलाफ मामला दर्ज कर जांच शुरू की India News Haryana (इंडिया न्यूज), Jind Crime : विश्वकर्मा कालोनी में पत्नी के चरित्र पर संदेह के चलते पति ने थिनर तेल छिड़ककर आग लगा दी। आगजनी के बाद महिला की चीख पुकार सुनकर मौके पर पहुंचे जेठ व जेठानी ने महिला पर पानी छिड़ककर आग को बुझाया। इसके बाद महिला को उपचार के लिए नागरिक अस्पताल में भर्ती करवाया। शहर थाना पुलिस ने महिला की शिकायत पर पति के खिलाफ मामला दर्ज कर जांच शुरू कर दी है। Jind Crime : मारपीट की और थिनर डाल कर आग लगा दी शहर थाना पुलिस को दी शिकायत में विश्वकर्मा कालोनी निवासी महिला ने बताया कि उसकी शादी 16 अप्रैल 2016 को विश्वकर्मा कालोनी निवासी सुरेश कुमार के साथ हुई थी। उसका पति और वह मजदूरी करते हैं। इसके चलते उसका पति उसके चरित्र पर संदेह करता है। वह तीन सितंबर को घर पर अपने बच्चों व पति के लिए खाना बना रही थी। इस दौरान उसके पति ने उसके साथ मारपीट की और थिनर डाल कर आग लगा दी। शोर मचाया तो जेठ व जेठानी मौके पर पहुंचे अचानक से आग उसके शरीर पर भड़क गई और उन्होंने बचाव के लिए शोर मचाया तो जेठ व जेठानी मौके पर पहुंचे। उन्होंने पानी डाल कर आग को बुझाया और बाद में उपचार के लिए नागरिक अस्पताल में भर्ती करवाया। जहां पर चिकित्सकों ने उसकी गंभीर हालात को देखते हुए रोहतक पीजीआई रेफर कर दिया। शहर थाना प्रभारी मनीष सहारण ने बताया कि पुलिस ने महिला के पति सुरेश के खिलाफ मामला दर्ज कर जांच शुरू कर दी है। Railway Track पर ट्रैकिंग मशीन की चपेट में आने में युवक की मौत Drug Trafficking : कार सवार दो नशा तस्कर 1 किलो 930 ग्राम चरस सहित गिरफ्तार

title: NFL Rumors: Jordan Love Targets Week 5 Return for Packers vs. Rams After Knee Injury
creator: Julia Stumbaugh
content: Green Bay Packers quarterback Jordan Love is targeting a Week 5 return against the Los Angeles Rams from his knee injury, NFL Network's Ian Rapoport reported Sunday. ESPN's Adam Schefter initially reported that Love would miss three to four weeks after suffering a sprained MCL on Sept. 6. Schefter noted that MCL injuries "typically" do not necessitate surgery. The injury occurred in the final seconds of the Packers' season-opening loss to the Philadelphia Eagles in São Paulo, Brazil. Love had gone 17-of-34 for 260 yards, two touchdowns and an interception before he was helped off the field. NFL Network's Tom Pelissero reported on Sept. 8 that the Packers were "focused on preparing Malik Willis and Sean Clifford" ahead of the team's home opener against the Indianapolis Colts on Sunday. The Packers acquired Willis from the Tennessee Titans in late August after Clifford struggled in the preseason. The two quarterbacks had made a combined total of 13 NFL appearances and three starts heading into the 2024 season. Willis made his Packers debut when he stepped in as relief for Love in the final moments of the 2024 season opener in Brazil. The 2022 third-rounder threw an incompletion before taking a sack on the final play of the game. Love started 17 games in his first campaign as the Packers' starter, marking a 9-8 record while recording 4,159 yards, 32 touchdowns and 11 interceptions to lead the Packers into the divisional round. His injury occurred just over one month after the...

title: रात को सोने से पहले अगर अपने इस अंग पर सरसो का तेल लगा लेते हैं पुरुष, सोचा भी न हो मिलेंगे ऐसे फायदे!
content: India News (इंडिया न्यूज), Benefits Of Mustard Oil For Men: सरसों का तेल अपने कई औषधीय गुणों के लिए जाना जाता है और यह शरीर के लिए बेहद फायदेमंद होता है। इसमें मौजूद विटामिन्स, मिनरल्स, आयरन, एंटीऑक्सीडेंट्स, और अन्य पोषक तत्व शरीर को न केवल पोषण देते हैं, बल्कि इसे मजबूत भी बनाते हैं। सरसों के तेल से मालिश करने से ब्लड सर्कुलेशन बेहतर होता है और यह शरीर की हड्डियों को भी मजबूती प्रदान करता है। अगर सोने से पहले सरसों के तेल को शरीर के 5 प्रमुख अंगों पर लगाया जाए, तो यह विशेष लाभ देता है: 1. पैरों के तलवों पर मालिश: रात में सोने से पहले पैरों के तलवों पर सरसों के तेल से मालिश करने से थकान दूर होती है और अच्छी नींद आती है। यह न केवल फटी एड़ियों को ठीक करने में मदद करता है, बल्कि मानसिक शांति भी देता है। सिर्फ शहद में काली किशमिश डुबोकर खाने से पुरुषों को मिलते है इन 5 बड़ी परेशानियों से छुटकारा, जान लें सेवन का सही तरीका 2. नाभि पर तेल लगाना: नाभि शरीर का प्रमुख केंद्र है। सरसों का तेल नाभि पर लगाने से होंठों का कालापन दूर होता है और सूखे होंठों की समस्या भी ठीक होती है। इसके अलावा, यह पाचन तंत्र को भी मजबूत करता है और पेट की समस्याओं को दूर करने में सहायक होता है। 3. कान के पीछे: सरसों का तेल कान के पीछे लगाने से कान में जमा मैल साफ होता है और संक्रमण की समस्या दूर होती है। यह तेल कान के दर्द और सूजन को भी कम करने में कारगर है। क्या आपके कान में भी जम जाती हैं गंदगी? बिना किसी दर्द के यूं मिनटों में साफ़ होता दिखेगा कान! 4. माथे पर मालिश: माथे पर सरसों के तेल से मालिश करने से सिरदर्द और मानसिक तनाव दूर होता है। यह पुरानी सिरदर्द की समस्या को भी ठीक करने में सहायक हो सकता है।...

GAZİANTEP VE TÜRKİYE OBA MAKARNA'YI KONUŞUYOR! Oba Makarna'nın fabrikasındaki patlama anı kamerada!
content: Sakarya'nın Hendek ilçesinde bulunan Oba Makarna fabrikasında meydana gelen patlama anına ait yeni görüntüler ortaya çıktı. 30 kişinin yaralandığı patlamanın şiddeti saniye saniye kaydedildi. İŞTE PATLAMA ANLARI GAZİANTEP VE TÜRKİYE OBA MAKARNA'YI KONUŞUYOR! Oba Makarna'nın fabrikasındaki patlama anı kamerada! #SONDAKIKA #Gaziantep #ObaMakarna #patlama #hendek #Sakarya https://t.co/UTAqYrhJfS pic.twitter.com/iQ3e90Slrg TEM Otoyolu Hendek gişeleri mevkisinde faaliyet gösteren Oba Makarna fabrikasında saat 13.15 sıralarında patlama meydana geldi. Patlamanın ardından 112 Acil Çağrı Merkezi'ne yapılan ihbar üzerine bölgeye Sakarya başta olmak üzere Düzce ve Kocaeli'den çok sayıda itfaiye, sağlık, AFAD, orman, polis ve jandarma personeli sevk edildi. İlk tespitlere göre fabrikanın değirmen bölümünde meydana geldiği değerlendirilen patlamanın ardından bölgedeki çalışmalar sürüyor. Patlama anına ait görüntüler ortaya çıktı 30 kişinin yaralandığı patlama anına ilişkin yeni görüntüler ortaya çıktı. Fabrikanın adeta bomba gibi patladığı, alev ve dumanların yükseldiği anlar saniye saniye görüntülendi. Öte yandan yaralılardan birinin 12 yaşındaki bir çocuk olduğu öğrenildi. Babası ile iş yerine geldiği esnada patlamada yaralanan çocuğun sağlık durumunun iyi olduğu öğrenildi. Kaynak: İHA

title: Ailesinin gözü önünde boğuldu
content: KAHRAMANMARAŞ'ta Suriye uyruklu Ahmed Akrağ (29) serinlemek için girdiği baraj göletinde ailesinin gözü önünde boğuldu. Olay saat 16.00 sıralarında merkez Onikişubat ilçesinin Suçatı Mahallesi'nde meydana geldi. İddiaya göre ailesiyle birlikte baraj göleti kenarına pikniğe giden Ahmed Akrağ, serinlemek için suya girdi. Akrağ, bir süre sonra yardım istemeye başladı ve ardından gözden kayboldu. Ailesinin ihbarı üzerine olay yerine jandarma , sağlık ve Kahramanmaraş Büyükşehir Belediyesi İtfaiye Daire Başkanlığı'na bağlı su altı arama kurtarma ekibi sevk edildi. Dalgıçların yaklaşık yarım saatlik arama-kurtarma çalışması sonrasında Ahmed Akrağ'ın cansız bedenine ulaşıldı. Olay yerinde yapılan incelemenin ardından Akrağ'ın cenazesi otopsi için Kahramanmaraş Adli Tıp Kurumu morguna götürüldü. Olayla ilgili soruşturma başlatıldı.

title: Tottenham 0-1 Arsenal: Which Spurs star 'didn't deserve to lose'? An Arsenal star oozes quality... but which defender struggled and scored 5.5?
content: Tottenham 0-1 Arsenal: Which Spurs star 'didn't deserve to lose'? An Arsenal star oozes quality... but which defender struggled and scored 5.5? Gabriel headed in a corner from Bukayo Saka to help Arsenal seal a 1-0 victory By Sami Mokbel and Isaan Khan Published: 16:24, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 16:54, 15 September 2024 e-mail 1 View comments Arsenal edged a heated north London derby on Sunday afternoon thanks to a second half header from Gabriel. In what was a heated first half that saw the most yellow cards shown in the opening 45 minutes of any Premier League game ever, the players clashed after Jurrien Timber narrowly avoided a red card. It was tight in the second half too, with Gabriel heading in Bukayo Saka 's corner for the only goal of the game. Arsenal went second with the win, while Tottenham remain in the bottom half after a difficult start to the campaign. Mail Sport's SAMI MOKBEL and ISAAN KHAN give their ratings from north London. Gabriel (left) scored the only goal of the game as Arsenal beat Tottenham in the north London derby on Sunday The defender, alongside William Saliba (right) helped his side to yet another clean sheet too Mikel Arteta (pictured) has now won three north London derbies away from home in a row - a feat Arsene Wenger failed to achieve Podcast All episodes PODCAST: Have England been playing with fear as Southgate suggests? Что лучше всего отбелит постельное белье — назван способ номер один
content: Эксперт по стирке из Time 4 Sleep Джонатан Уоррен считает, что лучший способ постирать белое постельное белье — это использовать не отбеливатель, а лимонный сок , передает Sports.kz со ссылкой на Unian.net . «Фантастическое натуральное моющее средство. Лимонный сок не только придает простыням восхитительный цитрусовый запах, но также содержит лимонную кислоту, которая убивает бактерии и хорошо известна своими отбеливающими свойствами», — отметил эксперт. Указывается, что отбеливатель может быть невероятно агрессивным по отношению к ткани и таким образом быстрее ее изнашивать. А лимонный сок — натуральное отбеливающее средство, которое способно восстановить постельное белье в кратчайшие сроки без повреждений. Как отбелить постельное белье с помощью лимонного сока Джонатан Уоррен советует перед тем, как стирать постельное белье, стоит сначала поместить его в холодную воду. «Это потому, что теплая вода может еще больше распространить пятна, в то время как холодная вода помогает остановить их на своем пути и дает вашему постельному белью наилучшие шансы на восстановление», — объяснил он. Затем все, что вам нужно сделать, это добавить лимонный сок стиральную машину вместе с порошком или гелем для стирки. После того, как простыни будут выстираны, по возможности развесьте их сушиться на улице, так как солнечный свет также обладает естественными отбеливающими свойствами. «Хотя это не всегда возможно, сушка простыней на воздухе является наиболее рекомендуемым вариантом...

title: Pourquoi l’Europe a-t-elle été peuplée plus tardivement que le reste de l’Eurasie ?
creator: Marie-Hélène Moncel, Archéologue, Muséum national d’histoire naturelle (MNHN)
content: Un projet de recherche vise à interroger les migrations humaines et le peuplement de l’Europe : pourquoi les premiers hominines ont-ils occupé l’Europe occidentale plus d’un million d’années après d’autres parties de l’Eurasie ? Les données récentes montrent que l’Europe de l’Ouest a été peuplée par des groupes humains beaucoup plus tardivement que le reste de l’Eurasie. Des sites en Chine attestent de la présence humaine à plus de 2 millions d’années alors qu’en Europe les âges sont d’environ un million d’années. Quelles sont les raisons de ce décalage chronologique ? Est-ce dû à un isolement de cette extrémité du continent pour des raisons climatiques ou une difficulté à y accéder, ou bien son occupation a-t-elle demandé des comportements et des stratégies particulières pour s’adapter à ces milieux tempérés ? Je coordonne un projet de recherche qui vise à comprendre ce peuplement tardif. Que savons-nous des premiers Européens ? Les restes fossiles sont très rares et les traces de la présence humaine sont les outillages en pierre et de rares traces de traitement des restes de carcasses de grands herbivores avec des stries de découpe ou des fracturations volontaires des os. Les hominines concernés ont été dénommés Homo antecessor et Homo heidelbergensis , regroupant peut-être des groupes humains variés, bien avant Neandertal. Des fossiles d’ Homo antecessor ont été datés entre 1,2 et 0,8 million d’années en Espagne. Des restes d’...

title: Trump tears into Taylor Swift in blazing Truth Social rage after pop megastar endorsed Kamala Harris
content: BREAKING NEWS Trump tears into Taylor Swift in blazing Truth Social rage after pop megastar endorsed Kamala Harris Swift revealed after Tuesday's debate she is voting for VP Kamala Harris By Katelyn Caralle, Senior U.S. Political Reporter In Washington, D.C. Published: 11:53 EDT, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 11:57 EDT, 15 September 2024 e-mail 4 View comments Donald Trump says he hates Taylor Swift after the pop star endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris . 'I HATE TAYLOR SWIFT!' the former president lamented on his social media website Truth Social on Sunday. It comes just five days after Swift said in a lengthy Instagram post that she would be voting for Harris in November. She also encouraged her millions of followers to do their research on the election and register to vote with a link she shared of vote.gov on her Instagram story sharing her grid post. Donald Trump responded to Taylor Swift's endorsement of Kamala Harris by saying he 'hates' the pop star Trump posted 'I HATE TAYLOR SWIFT!' on his Truth Social just five days after she revealed she was voting for Kamala Harris in November Trump's post on Sunday is his most poignant response to Swift so far. Right after the debate on Tuesday, Trump was asked about his reaction to Swift's endorsement and he replied simply with: 'I have no idea.' title: Leider ist das 5. Mittelalterfest in Zug schon wieder Geschichte
content: Max Landtwing Mehrere 10'000 Besucher erlebten rund um die Burg, dem Pulverturm und dem Daheimpark einen Einblick in die Zeit des Mittelalters. Viele Handwerker zeigten Vergessenes Brauchtum und man konnte sich ein Bild machen wie man im Mittelalter lebte. Vor allem im Daheimpark wo ein Heerlager aufgestellt war, konnten Gross und Klein sich darüber orientieren. Auch wurde Zeitgemässe Unterhaltung geboten mit Gaukler und Musikanten, die mit ihrer mittelalterlichen Musik und Gauklereien die Besucher unterhielten. Es wurde auch für das leibliche Wohl gesorgt wie es im Mittelalter zubereitet wurde, was viele Besucher sehr schätzten. Es ist auch positiv zu erwähnen, dass der ganze Anlass ohne Wegzoll zu erleben war und daraus auch das Interesse von nah und fern nach Zug um ins Mittelalter zu kommen und einzutauchen von vielen sehr geschätzt wurde. Das Organisationskomitee des VMFZ möchte sich bei allen Sponsoren, Helfern und Besuchern recht herzlich bedanken, denn ohne Sie wäre es nicht möglich gewesen, so ein Fest auf die Beine zu stellen. Das OK des Mittelalterfest Zug Mehr Artikel dieser Gemeinden

title: Grim warming to Aussie mortgage holders clinging to hope of an interest rate cut
content: Grim warning to Aussie mortgage holders clinging to hope of an interest rate cut RTA tipped to 'ignore' headline data READ MORE: Inside the RBA's $80,000 Christmas party By Duncan Evans For Nca Newswire Published: 16:54, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 17:03, 15 September 2024 e-mail View comments There's likely to be more suffering ahead for Aussie homeowners buckling under years of tightening mortgage stress, with a leading industry forecaster warning interest rate relief could still be many months away. Oxford Economics Australia expects the Reserve Bank of Australia to begin cutting rates in the second quarter of 2025, far beyond a late 2024 cut expected by other forecasters including banking giant Commonwealth Bank . 'Given the RBA's hawkish rhetoric, we don't see rate cuts coming until the second quarter of 2025,' Oxford Economics Australia head of macroeconomic forecasting Sean Langcake said ahead of the research firm's biannual economic outlook . Mr Langcake credits 'strong cross currents' in the Australian economy for the delayed cut, with policymakers navigating a 'challenging' outlook and environment. 'The labour market has defied a marked slowdown in activity, which is testing the RBA's very patient approach to bringing inflation back to its target,' he said. 'Concurrently, a significant easing in fiscal policy will give the economy a boost, which is welcome for households, but less so for inflation hawks.' The forecaster expects headline inflation to be very close...

title: Alcalde de Cuernavaca llama a servidores públicos a seguir trabajando por la capital
creator: Paola Alvear
content: Cuernavaca, 15 de septiembre 2024 (Infórmate y +).- Esta mañana el presidente municipal, José Luis Urióstegui Salgado, encabezó este domingo la ceremonia del CCXIV Aniversario del Inicio de la Independencia de México. Por lo que hizo un llamado a los servidores públicos a seguir trabajando por la ciudad, garantizando que cada recurso económico, material y humano se entreguen, brindando el servicio que la gente espera de ellos para evitar riesgos de nuevas confrontaciones que afecten a toda la Nación. El edil izó la bandera nacional en la sede Papagayo del Ayuntamiento de Cuernavaca, que fue escoltada por elementos de la Secretaría de Protección y Auxilio Ciudadano (SEPRAC) para posteriormente entonar el Himno Nacional al pie de la bandera tricolor. Urióstegui Salgado, puntualizó que al recordar esta gesta histórica del inicio de la Independencia de México deben tener presentes que la sociedad requiere una situación estable para el ejercicio libre y pleno de derechos, teniendo la oportunidad quienes están a cargo del mando y toma de decisiones de abonar a que esto sea una realidad o se convierta en causa propicia para el desorden y la falta de respeto a la legalidad. Resaltó que eventos como la delincuencia organizada y la corrupción ponen en riesgo a la población y la prestación de servicios para que la población tenga lo que necesita en su vida cotidiana, por lo cual como servidores públicos y al tener la oportunidad de servir y de transformar a la...

title: For this AP photographer, joy was all in the hands for a group of released political prisoners
creator: Moises Castillo
content: Moisés Castillo joined the AP in 1994 at the age of 19, covering Central America and Mexico while based in Guatemala City . He has reported on the end of the civil war in Guatemala, coups and other breaking news in Latin America, numerous natural disasters including earthquakes and volcanic eruptions, and the migration crisis. He has also covered major sporting events such as Copa America, Pan American Games, the World Cup and the recent Olympics in Paris. Why this photo? On the morning of Sept. 5, the U.S. government announced the release of 135 Nicaraguan political prisoners, who were to be received in Guatemala City. The announcement came as a complete surprise. We found the freed prisoners at one of the exits of the airbase they were flown to as they were being set up for transportation to different hotels. The newly released prisoners, who had to leave their home country, reacted with joy and gratitude. From the bus, several of them shouted, “Long live free Nicaragua!” while waving their hands out the windows or showing their passports. How I made this photo I had packed long lenses, expecting to photograph the plane that transported the freed prisoners on the airbase runway from far away but, in the end, that was no longer possible. Instead, they were already on a bus, and the driver was maneuvering to leave. They were right in front of me. With my Sony A1 camera and a wide-angle 35mm 1.4 lens, I began taking photos of their hands as they tried to get the attention of...

title: España niega la relación de los detenidos en Venezuela con el CNI
creator: AAG / Madrid
content: ESPAÑOLES DETENIDOS EN VENEZUELA España niega la relación de los detenidos en Venezuela con el CNI El Gobierno de España ha negado la relación de los dos ciudadanos españoles detenidos recientemente en Venezuela con el Centro Nacional de Inteligencia (CNI) , en respuesta a las declaraciones del ministro del Interior venezolano, Diosdado Cabello , quien aseguró que estos individuos estaban implicados en una "operación de desestabilización" supuestamente coordinada con la Agencia Central de Inteligencia (CIA) de Estados Unidos. Las autoridades venezolanas han identificado a los detenidos como José María Basoa Valdovinos y Andrés Martínez Adasme , ambos arrestados en la ciudad de Puerto Ayacucho , donde permanecen bajo custodia y están siendo interrogados. En una rueda de prensa, Cabello afirmó que los dos ciudadanos tienen "vínculos con el Centro Nacional de Inteligencia español" y con sectores cercanos a la oposición venezolana , los cuales, según sus declaraciones, estarían involucrados en la preparación de un complot para asesinar al presidente venezolano, Nicolás Maduro . Según estas afirmaciones, los detenidos formarían parte de un grupo más amplio, compuesto por catorce personas, relacionado con la dirigente opositora María Corina Machado . Además, el ministro aseguró que "la CIA está al frente de esta operación". Sin embargo, fuentes del Gobierno español , citadas por el diario The Objective, han rechazado de manera categórica las...

title: الطاقة: انخفاض أسعار المشتقات النفطية عالميا - AARC مصر
content: نعرض لكم زوارنا أهم وأحدث الأخبار فى المقال الاتي: الطاقة: انخفاض أسعار المشتقات النفطية عالميا - AARC مصر, اليوم الأحد 15 سبتمبر 2024 06:54 مساءً سرايا - انخفضت أسعار المشتقات النفطية في الأسواق العالمية خلال الأسبوع الثاني من الشهر الحالي، مقارنة بأسعارها في الأسبوع الأول من ذات الشهر، بحسب بيانات وزارة الطاقة والثروة المعدنية. ووفقا للبيانات التي أعلنتها الوزارة، اليوم الأحد، انخفض سعر البنزين أوكتان (90) من 675 إلى 648 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 4 بالمئة، وسعر البنزين أوكتان (95) من 714 دولارا إلى 686 دولارا للطن بنسبة انخفاض 4 بالمئة. كما انخفض سعر الديزل من 618 الى 588 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 5 بالمئة، وسعر الكاز من 671 الى 639 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 5 بالمئة. وانخفض سعر زيت الوقود من 418 إلى 413 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 1 بالمئة. وارتفع معدل سعر الغاز البترولي المسال من 575 دولارا خلال آب الماضي الى 598 دولارا خلال أيلول الحالي بنسبة ارتفاع 4 بالمئة . أما بالنسبة لخام برنت، فقد انخفض من 76 إلى 72 دولارا للبرميل بنسبة انخفاض 4 بالمئة. بترا لمتابعة وكالة سرايا الإخبارية على "فيسبوك" : إضغط هنا لمتابعة وكالة سرايا الإخبارية على "تيك توك" : إضغط هنا لمتابعة وكالة سرايا الإخبارية على "يوتيوب" : إضغط هنا

title: Polisi Tetapkan IS Warga Padang Pariaman Jadi Tersangka Pembunuhan Gadis Penjual Gorengan
content: Setelah melakukan pemeriksaan terhadap sejumlah saksi termasuk mengumpulkan alat bukti di lokasi kejadian. Polisi akhirnya menetapkan seorang berinisial IS sebagai tersangka pembunuhan (18), gadis . Hal tersebut dikatakan Kasat Reskrim Polres , Iptu AA Reggy. Ia mengatakan, penetapan tersangka terhadap IS dilakukan setelah polisi melakukan pemeriksaan terhadap sejumlah saksi termasuk mengumpulkan alat bukti di lokasi kejadian. "Berdasarkan fakta, barang bukti, dan keterangan saksi, kami telah menetapkan tersangka dalam kasus ini dengan inisial IS," katanya yang dilansir dari TribunPadang.com, Minggu (15/9/2024). IS diketahui merupakan warga . Saat ini, tersangka masih dalam diburu kepolisian. Pelaku diduga bersembunyi di hutan yang berada di sekitar lokasi kejadian. Warga sempat melihat pelaku bersembunyi di di sebuah gubuk yang berada di hutan. Polisi pun mendatangi gubuk tersebut. Ternyata, pelaku sudah melarikan diri dan hanya menemukan tas milik pelaku. "Hari ini, kami menemukan satu tas milik pelaku," kata AKBP Ahmad Faisol Amir dilansir dari Tribunpadang.com. Namun, Faisol tidak merinci isi yang ada di dalam tas milik terduga pelaku.

Real Madrid cancels concerts at its stadium after loud late gigs turned the Bernabeu in a 'torture-drome'
content: Real Madrid cancels concerts at its stadium after loud late gigs turned the Bernabeu in a 'torture-drome' The Bernabéu stadium recently underwent a five-year, £760m refurbishment By Katherine Lawton Published: 11:50 EDT, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 11:54 EDT, 15 September 2024 e-mail View comments Real Madrid has cancelled or rescheduled concerts at its Bernabéu stadium in Spain after loud gigs late at night turned the arena into a 'torture-drome'. The Bernabéu recently underwent a five-year, £760million refurbishment and held a number of high-profile concerts earlier this year. Major headliners have included Taylor Swift , Colombian star Karol G and Luis Miguel. But the noisy concerts have driven some locals to despair, with a group representing those living around the stadium beginning legal action. The locals complained about late finish times, fans camping in local parks, the blocking of roads and drunk people urinating in doorways. title: ताजमहल से पहले इन जगहों पर दफनाया गया था मुमताज महल का शव, वजह जान आप भी हो जाएंगे हैरान
content: India News (इंडिया न्यूज), Shah Jahan wife Mumtaz Mahal: ताजमहल को शाहजहाँ और मुमताज महल के प्रेम का प्रतीक माना जाता है। ताजमहल न केवल अपनी शानदार खूबसूरती के लिए दुनिया के अजूबों में से एक है, बल्कि इसके पीछे शाहजहाँ और मुमताज महल की गहरी प्रेम कहानी भी छिपी है, जो लोगों को आकर्षित करती है। ताजमहल की एक अनसुनी कहानी यह है कि मुमताज महल को पहले ताजमहल में नहीं, बल्कि उससे पहले तीन बार अलग-अलग जगहों पर दफनाया गया था। यह अनसुनी कहानी ताजमहल से जुड़ी कई कहानियों में से एक है, जो इस स्मारक को और भी खास बनाती है। 17 जून 1631 को हुई मृत्यु मुमताज महल का असली नाम अर्जुमंद बानो बेगम था। 17 जून 1631 को बुरहानपुर में उनकी मृत्यु हो गई थी। दक्षिण भारत में शाहजहाँ के सैन्य अभियान के दौरान मुमताज की मृत्यु अपनी 14वीं संतान गौहर आरा बेगम को जन्म देते समय हो गई थी। इस घटना से दुखी होकर शाहजहाँ ने मुमताज की याद में एक भव्य मकबरा बनवाने का फैसला किया। मुमताज महल की मृत्यु बुरहानपुर में हुई, इसलिए उन्हें बुरहानपुर में ही ताप्ती नदी के किनारे एक बगीचे के अस्थायी कब्र में दफना दिया गया था। ऐसा इसलिए क्योंकि उस समय ताजमहल का निर्माण शुरू नहीं हुआ था। मुमताज का आखरी दफन था यमुना किनारे शाहजहाँ चाहते थे कि मुमताज महल को ताजमहल में दफनाया जाए। इसलिए कुछ महीनों के बाद मुमताज के शव को बुरहानपुर से आगरा लाया गया। यहाँ उन्हे रौजा-ए-मुनव्वरा नामक एक अन्य अस्थायी मकबरे में रखा गया, क्योंकि ताजमहल का निर्माण अभी भी पूरा नहीं हुआ था। शाहजहाँ मुमताज से किया गया अपना वादा पूरा करना चाहते थे। इसलिए वह चाहते थे कि मुमताज को यमुना नदी के किनारे बने मकबरे में दफनाया जाए और यह उनके प्यार का प्रतीक बन जाए। ताजमहल...

title: "Актобе" после назначения нового тренера устроил разгром в матче КПЛ
Trattenuto «senza motivo» nel Cpr di Brindisi: ecuadoriano fa causa al ministero dell'Interno
creator: redazione.internet@gazzettamezzogiorno.it
content: BRESCIA - E’ stato trattenuto «senza motivo" nel Centro di permanenza per i rimpatri (Cpr) di Brindisi e ora attraverso il suo legale ha citato il ministero dell’Interno davanti al Tribunale di Roma chiedendo un risarcimento di 50mila euro. E’ la storia di un 25enne dell’Ecuador, domiciliato a Milano, difeso dall’avvocato bresciano Stefano Afrune. Richiedente asilo politico, in Italia «fin dalla prima adolescenza dove ha studiato e poi lavorato», era stato portato una prima volta nel Cpr di Roma, ma il Tribunale non aveva convalidato il provvedimento. Tornato libero si era presentato negli uffici della Questura di Milano per presentare domanda di protezione internazionale. Qui è stata però nuovamente azionata nei suoi confronti la procedura di trattenimento in un Cpr e quindi trasferito a Brindisi dal primo al 5 agosto scorso, quando il Tribunale di Lecce lo ha rimesso in libertà sostenendo che - così come indicato dal Tribunale di Roma - non c'erano ragioni per il trattenimento ritenuto «privo dei presupposti che lo giustificano». «E' evidente che il ragazzo è stato privato della libertà personale in maniera arbitraria ed illegittima», scrive l'avvocato Stefano Afrune nella richiesta danni contro il ministero dell’Interno.

title: Aus Dresden zurück in der Ukraine: Mein trauriges, stolzes Kiew
creator: redaktion@saechsische.de (Sächsische.de)
content: Wir treffen Viktorija Martsenko auf dem Maidan, dem größten Platz in der ukrainischen Hauptstadt, zu dem es die Kiewer zu allen Zeiten hinzog, wo Revolutionen ihren Anfang nahmen, wo man schon immer einkaufen ging und sich zum Bummeln traf. Auch jetzt, mitten im Krieg. Die größte Aufmerksamkeit finden allerdings gerade nicht die Geschäfte, sondern ein Gedenkort, der vielen Menschen das Herz zerreißt: Er besteht aus einem Meer aus blau-gelben Fahnen und Fähnchen, Erinnerungsstücken und Fotos von meist jungen Männern, sie erinnern an die vielen Tausend Toten des russischen Überfalls auf ihr Land. Für Ukrainer sind sie die Helden des Krieges. Viktorija Martsenko führt uns auf ganz schmalen Pfaden vorsichtig kreuz und quer durch dieses Fahnen- und Fähnchenmeer, um ja auf keines zu treten. Familien legen hier Blumen nieder, manche Kiewer knien vor dem Foto ihres Angehörigen, Tränen in den Augen. „Seit ich im Frühjahr aus Dresden fort bin, ist dieses Fahnenmeer in nur wenigen Monaten deutlich gewachsen“, sagt Viktorija Martsenko. „Es ist einfach schrecklich, wenn ein Land so viele Menschen verliert.“ Sie hat selbst Angehörige verloren. Ein Cousin starb bei Awdijiwka durch eine Artilleriegranate, der belagerte Ort war in den Frontberichten auch in Deutschland lange ein Thema. Ein anderer Cousin wurde bei einem Raketenangriff auf ein Wärmekraftwerk in Kiew schwer verletzt, viele seiner Kollegen starben dabei. Der Mann ihrer besten Freundin fiel als Offizier an der...

title: Hendek'te patlamada yaralı sayısı 30'a çıktı
content: YARALI SAYISI 30'A YÜKSELDİ Sağlık Bakan Yardımcısı Halim Özçevik, Sakarya Valisi Yaşar Karadeniz ile birlikte Hendek Devlet Hastanesi 'nde patlamada yaralananları ziyaret etti. Hastane önünde açıklamalarda bulunan Özçevik, yaralı sayısının arttığını belirterek, "Toplamda 30 yaralımıza ulaşıldı. Rakam biraz yükseldi. Yaralılardan 5'i taburcu edildi. Yaralılardan 3 tanesi itfaiye eri. Taburcu edilenlerden biri itfaiye erimiz. Yaralılarımızdan 2 tanesi entübe. Biri daha iyi şartlarda ve hastane yoğunluğu nedeniyle İstanbul'a sevk edildi. İstanbul'a nakledilen hastamızın durumu kritik. Bir tanesi de Kocaeli Şehir Hastanesi'nde entübe olarak takip ediliyor. Hastalarımız ağırlıklı olarak yanık vakaları. Diğer üç hastamızda Kocaeli Şehir Hastanesi'nde entübe olmayacak şekilde yoğun bakımda tedavi edilmekte. Yaralılardan bir tanesi 12 yaşında bir çocuk . Babasıyla iş yerine gelip patlama esnasında orada olduğu için yaralı olduğunu tespit ettik. Genel durumu iyi. İstanbul'a giden hastamız operasyona alınacak durumu kritik" diye konuştu. Vali Karadeniz'de yangına müdahale ile ilgili bilgiler vererek, "Silonun içinde devam eden bir ısı var. Isı enerjisinin bir risk oluşturmasından dolayı tedbir alındı. Soğutma çalışmaları devam ediyor. Isı düşürülünceye kadar orada devam eden bir risk var. Soğutma çalışmasıyla ısı düşürüldükten sonra risk bitmiş diyebileceğiz" dedi.

title: 'Third party influence' to have major impact on outcome of election
creator: Falyn Stempler
content: A third-party ballot has the potential to spoil the outcome of the November election, political experts have warned. Despite dropping out of the race and endorsing Donald Trump , Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will still remain on several ballots including in at least two key swing states , Michigan and Wisconsin, after his eleventh-hour drop out in late August proved difficult at best and unlawful at worst to accommodate. This proves particularly worrisome because the election is projected to be a close race as Trump and Kamala Harris are polling neck-in-neck in battleground states, which means RFK Jr. will be taking away critical votes from a primary party candidate. Razor-thin margins in polls before ABC TV debate as RFK Jr adds major twist Disaster for Trump as less than half of RFK Jr voters switch to former president Already, RFK Jr.'s ballot is causing problems in a key swing state, North Carolina, after its Supreme Court ruled it has to destroy and reprint millions ballots to accommodate his last-minute withdrawal, which he didn't officially file for in the state until five days after deadline and four days after suspending his campaign. This may particularly affect mail-in voters living out of state, including service members overseas, which goes against federal statutes. The likelihood of a third-party ballot altering the election is not implausible as it affected the outcome of a US election not so long ago, said Jo Freeman, a prolific feminist author with a PhD in...

title: D1 ACFF: Battue 1-2 par Stockay, la RUTB ne peut s’en prendre qu’à elle-même
content: Les Blanc et Or ont dominé. Les Blanc et Or se sont créés des occasions dix-huit carats. Et à la fin, les Blanc et Or se sont faits punir par des Saint-Georgiens opportunistes mais qui ont eu le mérite d'y croire jusqu'au bout. De quoi mettre le T1 Drazen Brncic dans une colère noire. " On perd ce match parce que nous manquons de qualité actuellement. Quand on loupe certaines choses depuis quelques matchs, ce n'est plus une question de chance mais bien de qualité et pour le moment, il n'y en a pas assez pour jouer le haut du tableau en D1 ACFF. " Le discours est franc et les propos sont durs. Trop peut-être car dans le contenu, on a vu des Brabançons wallons conquérants et qui se sont rebiffés après leur défaite de mercredi soir du côté de l'Olympic de Charleroi. Toutou Martins loupe certes l'immanquable seul face à Gonay à la 20e alors que Lauwrensens, Essikal, Migliore et Salazaku ont eux aussi eu l'opportunité de faire trembler les filets. En face, Stockay est inexistant et peine à sortir proprement le cuir. Dans les cordes, les visiteurs doivent donc logiquement courber l'échine quand Toutou Martins se rachète de son incroyable raté initial pour ouvrir le score à quelques minutes de la pause sur une offrande de Hendrickx. Les Liégeois remontent sur le terrain avec de meilleures intentions. Debauque s'interpose brillamment devant Kone mais une sortie mal maitrisée du dernier rempart tubizien offre un penalty indiscutable à un Bakija qui ne se...

title: Belan: Prvo ćemo promijeniti vlast u Podgorici, a onda i u državi
creator: urednik
content: Premijer Spajić kaže da nema razvoja Podgorice ako Vlada vodi jednu politiku, a lokal drugu, napisao je na društvenoj mreži X Vatroslav Belan, predsjednik Liberalne partije i jedan od lidera Evropskog saveza. “Učinjelo nam se da su prije 2020. bili snažni protivnici takvog stava i da su krvarili za pluralizam, demokratiju, a protiv jednoumlja”, naveo je Belan. Ali, kako je dodao, „riješićemo mu taj problem“. “Sad ćemo promjeniti vlast u Podgorici, a zatim i Vladu i učiniti da se i na lokalu i u državi vodi politika na istoj liniji – u korist Podgorice i države Crne Gore”, zaključio je Belan.

title: العاصفة "بوريس" تسبب فيضانات في شرق ووسط أوروبا وتُسفر عن قتلى
content: صدر الصورة، Reuters أدت العاصفة "بوريس" التي تضرب دول شرق ووسط أوروبا إلى مقتل سبعة أشخاص على الأقل وفقدان آخرين. وتسببت العاصفة في أضرار جسيمة وفيضانات غير مسبوقة في دول التشيك، سلوفاكيا، بولندا، ورومانيا. وانقطعت الكهرباء عن مئات الآلاف من المنازل في رومانيا وجمهورية التشيك وبولندا. ومن المتوقع هطول مزيد من الأمطار خلال الأيام المقبلة. "وضع مأساوي" صدر الصورة، PA-EFE/REX/Shutterstock كان أربعة أشخاص قد لقوا حتفهم السبت في رومانيا، وارتفعت الحصيلة هناك الأحد إلى خمسة، بينما غرق شخص في بولندا ولقي رجل إطفاء حتفه في النمسا، كما تم الإبلاغ عن فقدان أربعة آخرين في جمهورية التشيك. وألقت العاصفة بوريس ما يعادل أمطار شهر كامل على العديد من العواصم التاريخية في أوروبا، بما في ذلك فيينا وبراتيسلافا وبراغ. وفاضت الأنهار حتى ضفافها في بولندا وجمهورية التشيك، ومن المتوقع أن تستمر الفيضانات الكبيرة في جمهورية التشيك. وقد صدرت تنبيهات باللون الأحمر، وهو أعلى مستوى من التحذير، لأجزاء من بولندا وألمانيا وجمهورية التشيك والنمسا وسلوفاكيا. ويرتبط هذا المستوى من التنبيه بـ"ظواهر جوية شديدة" و"من المرجح أن تحدث أضرار جسيمة"، وفقاً لهيئة الأرصاد الجوية الأمريكية. واجتاحت الفيضانات أحياء بكاملها وشوارع في رومانيا ووصل مستوى المياه أكثر من متر، حيث وضِعت أكياس الرمل للحد من ارتفاع المياه. شرح معمق لقصة بارزة من أخباراليوم، لمساعدتك على فهم أهم الأحداث حولك وأثرها على حياتك الحلقات يستحق الانتباه نهاية وأعلنت أجهزة الإنقاذ في رومانيا أن منطقة "غالاتي" في جنوب شرق البلاد هي الأكثر تضرراً، حيث تأثرت آلاف المنازل. وذكرت وزارة الداخلية أن "أكثر من 5...

title: NASCAR Watkins Glen live updates: How to watch Sunday's Cup Series playoff race
content: The NASCAR Cup Series embarks on its second playoff of the 2024 season on Sunday with a road-course race at Watkins Glen International . Joey Logano won an eventful playoff opener at Atlanta Motor Speedway last weekend and became the first driver to clinch a berth in the second round. Atlanta’s playoff opener shuffled the playoff standings , with Team Penske drivers surging, and Hendrick Motorsports’ Kyle Larson, who entered the playoffs with the points lead, suffering a big drop after an early crash. With a shift from pack-racing at Atlanta to a road course race, the standings could see another major shuffle before next week’s elimination race at Bristol Motor Speedway, which will see four drivers eliminated from championship contention . The Go Bowling at The Glen can be live streamed on the NBC Sports website and the NBC Sports app. The race is also available to stream on Fubo . title: “Arsenal” Ziemeļlondonas derbijā pārspēj “Hotspur”
content: Svētdien, 15. septembrī, Anglijas premjerlīgas mačā Londonas “Arsenal” ar 1:0 (0:0) pārspēja Totenhemas “Hotspur”. “Arsenal” uzvaru spēja izcīnīt, spēlējot viesos. Vienīgos vārtus šajā spēlē guva Gabriels Magaļaiss. Viņš pretinieku vārtu vīru Gilelmo Vikario pārspēja spēles 64. minūtē, bumbu pretinieku tīklā raidot pēc stūra sitiena. Šī spēle attaisnoja savu derbija statusu, jo jau pirmajā puslaikā abu komandu spēlētāji kopumā nopelnīja septiņas dzeltenās kartītes. Piecus no septiņiem brīdinājumiem saņēma viesu futbolisti. Mača tiesnesis Džereds Žilē kļuva par sava veida rekordistu, jo septiņas dzeltenās kartītes pirmā puslaika ietvaros ir atkārtots premjerlīgas rekords. title: Top legal adviser to New York City mayor quits as investigations swell
creator: The Canadian Press
content: NEW YORK (AP) — The top legal adviser to New York City Mayor Eric Adams resigned abruptly over the weekend, the latest sign of instability in the Democrat's administration as it deals with multiple federal investigations. City Hall announced Lisa Zornberg's departure late Saturday night. She had advised Adams and other city officials on legal strategy for over a year and often parried legal questions from the press on his behalf. She was not his personal lawyer. “It has been a great honor to serve the City. I am tendering my resignation, effective today, as I have concluded that I can no longer effectively serve in my position. I wish you nothing but the best,” Zornberg wrote in a three-sentence resignation letter to Adams. The resignation comes after the phones of multiple members of Mayor Eric Adams' inner circle were , including the head of New York City's police department, Zornberg, a former federal prosecutor in the U.S. attorney's office now leading some of the investigations into the Adams administration, wasn't one of the officials who had their phones seized. The police commissioner, Edward Caban resigned citing the “distraction” created by news of the the investigations. Federal authorities haven't disclosed the subjects of the investigations. Besides the police commissioner, phones were taken from the head of the public schools system, a top deputy mayor, and two top advisers to Adams on public safety issues. Investigators seized devices from Caban’s twin...

title: Alert youth foils Ganja smuggling attempt in Kothagudem
content: An alleged attempt to smuggle ganja in an ambulance was foiled by alert local youth in Ramavaram area in Kothagudem town in the early hours of Sunday after the vehicle got stranded on the roadside following a tyre burst. Sources said that the ambulance bearing Tamil Nadu registration number was heading towards Kothagudem from Odisha when one of its tyres burst early on Sunday morning. The driver of the empty ambulance sought the help of some locals to get the tyre repaired. The local youth grew suspicious of the attitude of the driver and opened the stationary ambulance door. They reportedly found several packets of ganja in the vehicle and immediately alerted the local police. The police reportedly detained the crew of the empty ambulance for questioning. However, the police were yet to confirm the exact quantity of the ganja reportedly found concealed in the vehicle. title: Rennes routs Montpellier 3-0 in French league
creator: The Canadian Press
content: PARIS (AP) — The French league season marking 's 50th anniversary is just four matches old, but there are alarming signs it could be a nightmare for the southern city's team. Montpellier's ambitions have been hampered by the , preventing the club from securing the reinforcements it planned. The result? Montpellier sits in last place and is still winless after Sunday's 3-0 loss at that marked its third defeat in four matches so far. In addition to its financial issues, Montpellier traveled to Rennes with several injured players — its three left-backs are currently sidelined — and was second best throughout the afternoon. put the hosts in front in the 24th minute and goals from and Albert Gronbaek completed the win. It was Rennes' second victory this season. Montpellier won the French league title once, in 2012, when it upset Paris Saint-Germain. Montpellier’s title-winning squad featured nine homegrown players, in contrast to PSG’s relentless pursuit of stars at the expense of its own youth academy. The club also won the second division title in 1987 and the French Cup in 1990 with a team featuring the likes of Eric Cantona, Laurent Blanc and Julio Cesar. at the top of the standings with a fourth win in as many games on Saturday. scored twice in the 3-1 win against Brest. PSG has a two-point lead at the top. ___ AP soccer: The Associated Press

title: مروان خوري: انتهيت مؤخرا من تسجيل ديو غنائي مع صابر الرباعي
content: كشف الفنان اللبناني مروان خوري أنه انتهى مؤخراً من تسجيل ديو غنائي مع الفنان التونسي صابر الرباعي. وقال في تصريحات لـ"العربية.نت" إن الديو من كلماته وألحانه، مضيفاً أنه تم تسجيله مع الفرقة الموسيقية وسيعرض قريباً. فيما تطرق إلى أغنيته "الأنا" التي أطلقها قبل شهر وعبّر من خلالها عن الواقع الذي يعيشه معظم الناس هذه الأيام وأوضح أنه يعتبر هذه "الأنا" موجودة داخل كل إنسان، "فأحياناً تكون ضرورية للبقاء والنجاح شرط ألا نجعلها تتجاوز حدها، كي لا تتحول إلى "مرض"، لأنها حين تصبح مرضية ستكون مؤذية للشخص ومحيطه على حد سواء". كما أكد أنه مثل كل الناس يعيش هذه "الأنا" في داخله، "غير أنها ليست متضخمة ولا مبالغاً فيها، إنما هي مضبوطة ومدروسة ومعقولة وضمن الحدود اللازمة إلى ذلك لفت إلى أنه، خلال مسيرته الفنية، كان له تعاون في الكلمات والألحان مع أكثر من فنان، بينهم صابر الرباعي وكارول سماحة وفضل شاكر، معتبراً أن النجاح كان حليفهم، فضلاً عن إليسا التي تعاون معها عدة مرات وقد شكلا معاً ثنائية مميزة وناجحة. وشدد على أنه رغم الخلاف أو الفتور الذي كان يشوب العلاقة بينهما أحياناً، فقد كانا يستأنفان التعاون ويصلان إلى نتائج جيدة، وهذا يعود برأيه إلى تشابه الإحساس الفني ولغة التعبير بينهما وانتمائهما للمدرسة الرومانسية. كما أكد أن إليسا مريحة في اختيار أغانيها وتعرف تماماً ماذا تريد، مبيناً: "باختصار هناك كيمياء بيننا وتقارب من حيث التجربة الفنية، وإن شاء الله سيكون هناك مزيد من التعاون بيننا في أغنيات ألبومها المقبل" العربية نت

title: MKE Ankaragücü'nde Cihat Arslan Dönemi Sona Erdi
creator: Anadolu Ajansı
content: MKE Ankaragücü'nde Yeni Bir Dönem Başlıyor Trendyol 1. Lig'in köklü ekiplerinden MKE Ankaragücü , teknik direktör Cihat Arslan ile yollarını ayırma kararı aldı. Kulüpten yapılan açıklamada, iki taraf arasında gerçekleştirilen görüşmeler sonucunda karşılıklı anlaşma sağlandığı belirtildi. Resmi Açıklama Sarı-lacivertli kulüp tarafından yapılan açıklamada, Cihat Arslan 'a emeklerinden dolayı teşekkür edilerek, kariyerinin devamında başarılar dilendi. Açıklamanın detayları şu şekilde: Cihat Arslan Döneminin Değerlendirilmesi MKE Ankaragücü , sezonun başında göreve gelen Cihat Arslan yönetiminde çıktığı 5 maçta 2 galibiyet ve 3 mağlubiyet yaşayarak istediği başarıyı elde edemedi. Bu sonuçların ardından kulüp, yeni bir strateji ile yoluna devam etme kararı aldı.

title: Likwidacja szkód po powodzi
creator: JG, PAP
content: Ubezpieczyciele uprościli procedury likwidacji szkód spowodowanych przez powodzie, jest ona możliwa do przeprowadzenia w ciągu jednego dnia - poinformowała Polska Izba Ubezpieczeń (PIU). Jak wskazano, uruchomione zostały specjalne infolinie, a na miejsce wysyłani są likwidatorzy. „Zakłady ubezpieczeń zwiększyły siły dla południa Polski już od piątku. Monitorują sytuację i kontaktują się ze swoimi klientami” - poinformowała PIU. Według przekazanych przez Izbę informacji, firmy uruchomiły specjalne infolinie, a także wysyłają likwidatorów na tereny objęte podtopieniami. „Do klientów na terenach objętych alertami są wysyłane sms-y z ostrzeżeniami i prośbą o kontakt, gdyby potrzebna była pomoc. To już praktyka wszystkich zakładów w Polsce przy tego typu masowych szkodach. Zakłady też maksymalnie upraszczają procedury tak, że wypłata jest możliwa w ciągu nawet jednego dnia” - zapewnił cytowany w komunikacie prezes PIU Jan Grzegorz Prądzyński. Dodał, że sytuacja nadal jest dynamiczna i wiele jeszcze może się wydarzyć. „Na razie wszyscy pochłonięci są ratowaniem siebie i dobytku przed żywiołem. To jest najważniejsze. W szacowaniu strat i likwidacji szkód pomożemy szybko, gdy minie bezpośrednie zagrożenie życia i zdrowia” – zapewnił Prądzyński. JG, PAP

title: انخفاض أسعار المشتقات النفطية عالميا في الأسبوع الثاني من الشهر الحالي - AARC مصر
content: نعرض لكم زوارنا أهم وأحدث الأخبار فى المقال الاتي: انخفاض أسعار المشتقات النفطية عالميا في الأسبوع الثاني من الشهر الحالي - AARC مصر, اليوم الأحد 15 سبتمبر 2024 06:53 مساءً انخفضت أسعار المشتقات النفطية في الأسواق العالمية خلال الأسبوع الثاني من الشهر الحالي، مقارنة بأسعارها في الأسبوع الأول من ذات الشهر، بحسب بيانات وزارة الطاقة والثروة المعدنية. ووفقا للبيانات التي أعلنتها الوزارة، الأحد، انخفض سعر البنزين أوكتان (90) من 675 إلى 648 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 4%، وسعر البنزين أوكتان (95) من 714 دولارا إلى 686 دولارا للطن بنسبة انخفاض 4%. كما انخفض سعر الديزل من 618 الى 588 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 5%، وسعر الكاز من 671 الى 639 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 5%. وانخفض سعر زيت الوقود من 418 إلى 413 دولارا للطن، بنسبة انخفاض 1% وارتفع معدل سعر الغاز البترولي المسال من 575 دولارا خلال آب الماضي إلى 598 دولارا خلال أيلول الحالي بنسبة ارتفاع 4%. أما بالنسبة لخام برنت، فقد انخفض من 76 إلى 72 دولارا للبرميل بنسبة انخفاض 4%. المملكة

title: VW kollidiert beim Überholversuch mit BMW: Verkehrsunfall auf der A6 bei St. Ingbert – zwei Personen verletzt
creator: SZ Redaktion
content: Verkehrsunfall auf der Autobahn A6 kurz hinter der Anschlussstelle St.Ingbert -Mitte: Dort ist es am Sonntag, 15. September, am frühen Nachmittag laut einer Pressemeldung der örtlichen Polizeiinspektion zur Kollision zweier Autos gekommen, bei der zwei Personen leicht verletzt wurden. Der Fahrzeugführer eines blauen VW Golf war demnach kurz nach 14 Uhr in Fahrtrichtung Mannheim unterwegs und wollte vom rechten auf den linken Fahrstreifen wechseln – hat dabei aber offenbar einen silbernen BMW X3 übersehen, der sich bereits neben ihm auf der Überholspur befand. Zwei Personen leicht verletzt Die Fahrzeuge stießen zusammen und wurden durch die Wucht des Aufpralls in die Mittelleitplanke geschleudert. Der 32-Jährige Fahrer des BMW sowie dessen 33-Jährige Beifahrerin wurden dabei leicht verletzt und mussten mit Rettungswägen in ein naheliegendes Krankenhaus gebracht werden. Der 38-Jährige Fahrer des VW Golf indes blieb unverletzt. Ersten Einschätzungen ist ein Sachschaden knapp 30 000 Euro entstanden. Im Zuge der Unfallaufnahme und Bergung der beiden Fahrzeugen war die A6 für etwa...

title: Furia Xeneize contra Pol Fernández por saludar a los hinchas de Racing y lanzar un polémico posteo
content: Boca no pudo de visitante ante Racig y sufrió una dura derrota por 2 a 1 en Avellaneda . Más allá del enojo que provocó el resultado adverso en el público Xeneize, otro hecho sacudió al mundo boquense . A los 25 minutos de la segunda etapa el entrenador Diego Martínez decidió sacar del campo de juego a su subcapitán Pol Fernández cuando el partido estaba igualado. Al retirarse, Fernández saludó al público local y los hinchas de Boca se hicieron eco de la situación . Además, se hizo viral un video con un comentario que hacía referencia a un pedido de disculpas. Frente a eso, el futbolista emitió un fuerte comentario. "Dejen de informar mal. Sólo saludé a un público que me brindó cariño durante un año y juntos pudimos ser CAMPEONES. Hay que ser agradecido siempre" , escribió. Los hinchas de Boca se mostraron insatisfechos por la reacción y por el posterior mensaje del jugador:

title: While ex-coach Fabian Hürzeler dazzles the Premier League St. Pauli is struggling in Germany
creator: The Canadian Press
content: AUGSBURG, Germany (AP) — Fabian Hürzeler is the English Premier League's after going unbeaten in his first four league games at . His old club is in trouble already. The 31-year-old Texas-born coach got Hamburg-based St. Pauli back to the last season for the first time since 2011, but left a month later to join Brighton. Three games into the Bundesliga season and St. Pauli has yet to earn a point. Now coached by Alexander Blessin, Sunday's 3-1 loss at Augsburg left St. Pauli in the relegation zone. At least it shed the unwanted record of being the league's only team yet to score a goal. New signing gave Augsburg the lead shortly after halftime with his first Bundesliga goal since August 2022, before headed in a second. 's header got St. Pauli back into the game but 's added-time goal secured the win for Augsburg. The only team below St. Pauli in the table is the other promoted club, , which has three losses and a goal difference of minus 8 after being on Saturday. Augsburg's win was its first of the season in the Bundesliga and came three days after coach Jess Thorup was given a contract extension through 2026. Mainz hosted in the Bundesliga later Sunday. ___ AP soccer: The Associated Press

title: Rain washes out England-Australia T20I series finale
content: NEW DELHI: Persistent rain on Sunday forced the abandonment of the third Twenty20 match between England and Australia at Old Trafford. The match, scheduled to start at 2:30 pm local time, was called off without even toss happening in Manchester. Both the toss and the match were delayed as rain fell throughout the morning, creating deep puddles on the covers that protected the pitch. The official cut-off time for a minimum five-overs-per-side match was set at 5:46 pm. However, a fresh downpour just before a planned pitch inspection led the umpires to call off the match at 4:18 pm. The series ended in a 1-1 draw. England's win in the second T20 match in Cardiff, led by Liam Livingstone's score of 87, followed Australia's victory in the opening match in Southampton. England will next play a five-match one-day international series against Australia, starting at Trent Bridge in Nottingham on Thursday.

title: Arvestrid om Murdochs medieimperium skal avgjøres i retten
creator: NTB Nyheter
content: Murdoch, som i mars fylte 93 år, forsøker å endre vilkårene i familiens stiftelse for å sikre at hans aviser og kringkastingsnettverk forblir under kontroll av hans eldste sønn og utpekte arving, Lachlan Murdoch, ifølge New York Times , som har fått tilgang til et forseglet rettsdokument som beskriver arvestriden. Med endringene ønsker familieoverhodet å hindre Lachlans tre søsken, Prudence, Elisabeth og James, som alle regnes som mer politisk moderate, fra å kunne overstyre eldstesønnen, som for øyeblikket leder Fox og sitter som styreleder i News Corp, som er to av Murdochs største selskaper. Begge eies og kontrolleres gjennom den nevnte familiestiftelsen. I rettssaken, som går sin gang i Reno i Nevada, må Murdoch gjøre rede for hvordan de foreslåtte endringene i stiftelsen vil komme alle arvingene til gode. – Han må bevise at disse endringene blir gjort med gode hensikter, sier advokat Shane Jasmine Young, som spesialiserer seg på formuesbestyrelse. I stiftelsen er det blant annet lagt fram en plan for hvordan en eventuell overtakelse kan skje når Murdoch dør. Da vil de stemmeberettigede aksjene i alle hans selskaper overføres til hans fire eldste barn. Dermed kan tre av arvingene potensielt overstyre en fjerde, noe som kan føre til en lengre kamp om selskapenes fremtid senere. title: Top legal adviser to New York City mayor quits as investigations swell
creator: Cedar Attanasio
content: The top legal adviser to New York City Mayor Eric Adams resigned abruptly over the weekend, the latest sign of instability in the Democrat's administration as it deals with multiple federal investigations. City Hall announced Lisa Zornberg's departure late Saturday night. She had advised Adams and other city officials on legal strategy for over a year and often parried legal questions from the press on his behalf. She was not his personal lawyer. “It has been a great honor to serve the City. I am tendering my resignation, effective today, as I have concluded that I can no longer effectively serve in my position. I wish you nothing but the best,” Zornberg wrote in a three-sentence resignation letter to Adams. The resignation comes after the phones of multiple members of Mayor Eric Adams' inner circle were seized by federal investigators, including the head of New York City's police department, who resigned Thursday. Zornberg, a former federal prosecutor in the U.S. attorney's office now leading some of the investigations into the Adams administration, wasn't one of the officials who had their phones seized. The police commissioner, Edward Caban resigned citing the “distraction” created by news of the the investigations. Federal authorities haven't disclosed the subjects of the investigations. Besides the police commissioner, phones were taken from the head of the public schools system, a top deputy mayor, and two top advisers to Adams on public safety issues. Investigators...

title: Calcio - Colpo Varesina: basta Bertoli per superare l’Arconatese - Sport - Varese News
creator: Francesco Mazzoleni
content: La Varesina ingrana anche la seconda , ottenendo un pesante successo di misura, 1-0, sul campo dell’Arconatese. Allo stadio “Gianni Brera” di Pero, che ospita anche le gare interne del Club Milano, parte fortissimo la squadra di mister Marco Spilli, la quale riesce subito a mettere la testa davanti grazie alla rete siglata al 7’ dal bomber Marco Bertoli , che riceve un gran pallone da Guidetti e davanti all’estremo difensore avversario non fallisce l’appuntamento con la seconda marcatura stagionale, dopo il gol all’esordio, contro la Pro Palazzolo. A seguito del vantaggio, la Varesina è bravissima a controllare la partita alternando momenti di attesa e momenti di pressing. ( Foto Facebook – Varesina ) Nel primo tempo la squadra casalinga non riesce ad essere pericolosa, se non in due situazioni sventate dalla retroguardia rossoblù. La squadra di Livieri inizia in maniera arrembante il secondo tempo e crea un pericolo con un cross velenoso del subentrato Medici diretto a Ravasi sul palo opposto, ma Cosentino è bravo ad anticipare il “7”, sventando così il pericolo. Una volta lasciati sfogare gli avversari la Varesina cerca a più riprese il gol del raddoppio, già vicino nella prima frazione con due punizioni velenose di Guidetti, e ci va vicina con Ghioldi e Gianola. Alla fine la Varesina riesce a portare a casa il risultato e in classifica è appaiata ad altre tre squadre a punteggio pieno con 6 punti (Desenzano, Sant’Angelo e Ospitaletto). L’Arconatese continua nel suo...

title: Her koker det før kampen
Trump asegura que odia a la cantante Taylor Swift por su apoyo a Kamala Harris
creator: NTM / EFE
content: Cinco días después de que el icono de la música Taylor Swift dijera que va a votar a Kamala Harris en las próximas elecciones presidenciales, el candidato republicano Donald Trump ha asegurado este domingo que odia a la cantante estadounidense con más éxito del momento. Con un directo "¡ODIO A TAYLOR SWIFT!" con mayúsculas y exclamaciones, Trump se ha desahogado a través de su red social Truth Social contra la multipremiada artista, la más escuchada en los últimos años a nivel internacional en plataformas como Spotify. "Señora soltera con gatos" El pasado martes, poco después de que concluyera el debate que enfrentó a los dos principales candidatos a la presidencia estadounidense, el expresidente republicano Donald Trump y la actual vicepresidenta, la demócrata Kamala Harris , Swift publicó en Instagram un extenso post en el que contaba a sus 283 millones de seguidores que en los comicios del 5 de noviembre votará por Harris. Swift posó con una foto de su gato Benjamin y firmó su publicación como "señora soltera con gatos" , una referencia al compañero de fórmula de Trump, el senador por Ohio J.D. Vance, quien criticó a Harris y a las mujeres sin hijos llamándolas de esa manera. A post shared by Taylor Swift (@taylorswift) Un día después, 337.826 personas habían visitado el enlace de www.vote.org que Swift adjuntó en la publicación, según dijo un portavoz de la Administración de Servicios del Gobierno de Estados Unidos al medio Hollywood...

title: Annual Battle of Britain service at Westminster Abbey sees flypast watched by Rishi Sunak and Keir Starmer
content: Annual Battle of Britain service at Westminster Abbey sees flypast watched by Rishi Sunak and Keir Starmer By Matt Strudwick Published: 11:49 EDT, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 11:52 EDT, 15 September 2024 e-mail View comments Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer and former premier Rishi Sunak attended Westminster Abbey today to mark the 84th Battle of Britain Anniversary Service. Sir Keir and Mr Sunak both met Venerable Dr Giles Legood, Chaplain-in-Chief of the Royal Air Force , and watched the carrying of the Battle of Britain Roll of Honour. The pair also stood together on a balcony to watch a Second World War-era flypast over Westminster Abbey featuring a Lancaster Bomber. The service included readings from Chief of the Air Staff, Air Chief Marshal Sir Richard Knighton, Dr Legood and Sergeant Angela Luddington. Members of the Royal Air Force also sang hymns throughout the ceremony. Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer attended Westminster Abbey today to mark the 84th Battle of Britain Anniversary Service Former premier Rishi Sunak also attended the service today A Lancaster Bomber flies during a flypast over Westminster Abbey Mr Sunak Sir Keir stand on a balcony together as they watch a flypast over Westminster Abbey The service marks the victory, and loss of life, by the Royal Air Force during the Battle of Britain in 1940. Westminster Abbey has held a service of thanksgiving and rededication on Battle of Britain Sunday every year since 1944. The event, which was held between 11am...

title: ارادة ملكية بتعيين قضاة لدى محكمة عمان الابتدائية
[BGL Ligue] Au F91, le Racing gagne le choc du week-end
creator: Julien Mollereau
content: Ce n’est pas parce que Rotundo a ouvert le score très tôt, d’un joli ballon du gauche dans le petit filet, sur une récupération à l’entrée de la surface (1-0, 5e), que le F91 a maîtrisé sa première période comme il l’aurait dû. C’est en effet un nouveau test majeur qu’il passait contre le Racing, dont la mise en place est l’une des belles surprises de ce début de saison. Hadji lancera encore Schauls, qui serait parti seul au but s’il n’avait pas été signalé hors-jeu au bout de ce joli mouvement (36e). Bojic ne verra personne couper son centre-tir fort devant le but sur coup-franc, qui passera à côté (45e). Mais c’est tout ce que parviendra à se payer un Dudelange légèrement privé de ballon et globalement bien payé de rentrer à 1-1 aux vestiaires, à la pause. Parce que le RFCU s’est fabriqué pas mal d’occasions pour faire mieux que l’égalisation de Mazié, du plat du pied, parfaitement servi sur la profondeur par Ikene (1-1, 20e). Mabella, qui avait jaillit devant Desprez sur une ouverture de Sow, a raté le but vide, du gauche (15e). Mazié a mal contrôlé une ouverture de Pina Gomes qui l’isolait, à l’entrée de la surface (18e) et un centre de Mabella sera vendangé au deuxième poteau par Mazié, seul à deux mètres du but (24e). Dès que le Racing attaque la profondeur, il y a danger. Quand il ne la prend pas non plus d’ailleurs : Ikene, au lieu de chercher la passe, tente sa chance de 18 m, et tape l’extérieur du poteau (39e). La...

title: Serinlemek için girdiği baraj göletinde ailesinin gözü önünde boğuldu
content: Olay saat 16.00 sıralarında merkez Onikişubat ilçesinin Suçatı Mahallesi'nde meydana geldi. İddiaya göre ailesiyle birlikte baraj göleti kenarına pikniğe giden Ahmed Akrağ, serinlemek için suya girdi. Akrağ, bir süre sonra yardım istemeye başladı ve ardından gözden kayboldu. Ailesinin ihbarı üzerine olay yerine jandarma, sağlık ve Kahramanmaraş Büyükşehir Belediyesi İtfaiye Daire Başkanlığı'na bağlı su altı arama kurtarma ekibi sevk edildi. Dalgıçların yaklaşık yarım saatlik arama-kurtarma çalışması sonrasında Ahmed Akrağ'ın cansız bedenine ulaşıldı. Olay yerinde yapılan incelemenin ardından Akrağ'ın cenazesi otopsi için Kahramanmaraş Adli Tıp Kurumu morguna götürüldü. Olayla ilgili soruşturma başlatıldı.

title: Olaf Scholz News: Scholz schließt Migrationsabkommen mit Usbekistan
creator: kns/roj/news.de
content: Zum Auftakt seiner Zentralasien-Reise hat Bundeskanzler mit Usbekistan eine engere Zusammenarbeit bei der Steuerung der Migration nach Deutschland vereinbart. Ein Abkommen dazu wurde bei seinem Besuch der fast 3.000 Jahre alten Handelsstadt Samarkand an der Seidenstraße unterzeichnet. Es soll den Zuzug von Fachkräften insbesondere im Pflege- und Gesundheitsbereich und die Rückführung von Usbeken ohne Bleiberecht in Deutschland erleichtern. Weniger als 0,1 Prozent der Ausreisepflichtigen aus Usbekistan Bei letzterem Punkt geht es allerdings nur um rund 200 Personen. Das sind weniger als 0,1 Prozent aller 225.000 ausreisepflichtigen Migranten in Deutschland. Insgesamt leben 13.700 Usbeken in Deutschland. Abkommen mit einzelnen Herkunftsländern sind ein zentraler Bestandteil der Migrationspolitik der Ampel-Regierung. Um sie auszuhandeln, hat sie mit Joachim Stamp eigens einen Beauftragten eingesetzt. Sechstes Migrationsabkommen Erst am vergangenen Freitag wurde in Berlin ein Migrationsabkommen mit Kenia unterzeichnet, mit Indien, Georgien, Marokko und Kolumbien gibt es solche Vereinbarungen schon länger. Mit Moldau und Kirgistan sind die Verhandlungen bereits weit fortgeschritten, und auch mit den Philippinen und Ghana laufen Gespräche. Die Abkommen basieren immer auf zwei Säulen: Abschiebung von Personen ohne Bleiberecht und Anwerbung von Fachkräften für den deutschen Arbeitsmarkt. Abschiebung von Afghanen über Usbekistan unklar Usbekistan ist als Nachbarland...

title: На Украине сообщили о хищении 270 тысяч единиц оружия
creator: Александра Иванова
content: Эксперты сделали выводы по похищении на Украине десятков тысяч единиц оружия. С 24 февраля 2022 года в стране были утеряны или похищены 270 тысяч единиц различного оружия. О хищении значительного объёма вооружений сообщает издание «Фокус» со ссылкой на статистику сервиса «Опендатабот», специализирующегося на мониторинге государственных реестров. Авторы исследования сообщают, что с начала спецоперации на Украине пропало 270 тысяч единиц оружия, что составляет 40 процентов от общего количества, зарегистрированного в едином реестре. В 2024 году было утрачено по разным причинам 78 217 единиц – в четыре раза больше, чем до начала спецоперации. Чаще всего пропадали охотничьи ружья (27,9 процента), автоматы (27,8 процента) и карабины (10,8 процента). В списке похищенного оружия числятся автомат АК-74, пистолеты ПМ и карабины СКС. Лидерами по числу хищений стали Донецкая, Запорожская области и Киев (ДНР и Запорожская области вошли в состав России по итогам референдумов, однако Киев считает их своей территорией). Руководитель Украинской ассоциации владельцев оружия пояснил, что всё пропавшее оружие впоследствии оказывается на чёрном рынке. Он посетовал на ухудшение ситуации с незаконным оборотом оружия на Украине. В сентябре глава МИД Украины предложил странам Запада напрямую закупать для Киева оружие украинского производства. По его мнению, это сэкономит средства союзников Украины и время. Как отметил министр, по некоторым номенклатурам украинское оружие превосходит...

title: Le graining et Stroll ont ruiné la course de RB F1 à Bakou
creator: Emmanuel Touzot
content: Daniel Ricciardo a terminé 13e à Bakou malgré plusieurs abandons devant lui. Le pilote RB F1 ne cache pas un manque de rythme et des difficultés de gestion des pneus, avec du graining qui lui a coûté un temps précieux. "C’était une course difficile. Le départ s’est bien passé ; les pilotes en mediums devant moi semblaient avoir des difficultés, et nous avons pu les rattraper. J’étais sur le pneu dur et j’ai essayé de l’utiliser là où je le pouvais en allant loin et en trouvant le rythme" raconte Ricciardo. "Après quelques tours, nous avons eu beaucoup de graining, qui s’est aggravé pendant 10 tours, ce qui nous a fait perdre quelques secondes. L’équipe a pu constater que d’autres voitures parvenaient à se débarrasser du graining, mais cela nous a pris beaucoup plus de temps." "Lorsque nous y sommes parvenus, nous avons pu revenir et retrouver un peu de rythme, mais nous avions perdu beaucoup de terrain. Je n’ai jamais connu un tel graining, la variation du temps au tour a été de quatre secondes." "Nous devons comprendre pourquoi nous avons eu plus de graining pendant plus longtemps. Pour ce qui est de la suite, j’adore le circuit urbain de Marina Bay, alors j’espère que nous pourrons y faire un meilleur week-end." Yuki Tsunoda a été accroché au premier tour par Lance Stroll. Et s’il ne comprend pas la manœuvre de son rival, elle a ruiné sa chance de résultat : "Une course très courte, et l’opportunité perdue de marquer des points, ce qui aurait...

title: Menparekraf Sandiaga Uno Dorong UMKM di Palembang Mendunia
content: jpnn.com , PALEMBANG - Kehadiran Menteri Pariwisata dan Ekonomi Kreatif (Menparekraf) Sandiaga Uno di Kota Palembang memberikan angin segar bagi para pelaku UMKM. Pasalnya, agenda Kelana Nusantara dalam rangka Pengembangan Kabupaten/Kota Kreatif Indonesia, Minggu (15/9), melibatkan para pelaku UMKM di Kota Palembang. Pada kesempatan itu, UMKM di Kota Palembang berkesempatan berdiskusi dan mendapatkan ilmu baru langsung dengan para narasumber. Mereka juga berkesempatan menampilkan dan melakukan promosi masing-masing produk, mulai dari kuliner hingga kain khas daerah, di hadapan Menparekraf. Sandiaga Uno menyampaikan bahwa inovasi-inovasi seperti itu harus lebih banyak dikembangkan, begitu juga dengan berbagai event. Mantan wakil gubernur DKI Jakarta itu juga mengingatkan pentingnya berkolaborasi dalam pengembangan usaha. "Bermitra lebih baik, kolaborasi, tetapi harus teliti dalam memilih yang satu visi dan pemerintah harus menghadirkan pelatihan dan pendampingan," kata Sandi, Minggu. Dia menambahkan ada beberapa terobosan yang akan dikembangkan dan didiskukan bersama Penjabat (Pj) Wali Kota Palembang.

title: Erciyes 38 FK - Sebat Gençlikspor: 1-1
content: STAD: Atatürk Spor Kompleksi Yan Saha HAKEMLER: Veysel Karani Özkan, Ardahan Ilık, Önder Demir ERCİYES 38 FK : Kadem Burak – Taner (Dk.62 Muhammed), Berkay, İsmail, Yaşar, Ayhan (Dk.78 Caner), İsmet, Hüseyin Ekici, Ethem (Dk.78 Taha), Hüseyin Fındıkçı (Dk.34 Ekrem), Fevzi Can (Dk.78 Muhammed Emin) SEBAT GENÇLİKSPOR : Taha Ayan – Emrah, Mert, Burak Can, Rıdvan (Dk.72 Eyüp), Veysel, Burak, Doğukan, Furkan, Ziya (Dk.78 Güney), Taha Balcı GOLLER: Dk.20 Fevzi Can (Erciyes 38 FK) Dk.61 Ziya (Sebat Gençlikspor) SARI KART: Ayhan, İsmail, Yaşar (Erciyes 38 FK) Veysel, Rıdvan(Sebat Gençlikspor) TFF 3’üncü Lig 4’üncü Grup'ta sezonun ikinci haftasında Erciyes 38 FK, sahasında Sebat Gençlik ile 1-1 berabere kaldı.

title: Abbie Chatfield shares her shame over breaking cardinal skincare rule that left her complexion 'crook'
content: Abbie Chatfield shares her shame over breaking cardinal skincare rule that left her complexion 'crook' READ MORE: Abbie Chatfield blasts fan who slammed her for going braless in crude tirade By Marta Jary For Daily Mail Australia Published: 16:49 BST, 15 September 2024 | Updated: 16:51 BST, 15 September 2024 e-mail View comments Abbie Chatfield has confessed that she didn't always have the best skincare habits. The podcaster shared her shame in a TikTok post this week, revealing that she often wore a full face of glamorous makeup - and slept in it. In a further post to Instagram, Abbie begged her fans to comment their own 'crook' skincare habits to make her feel better. She also posted a throwback image in which she wore a heavy makeup look including glitter shadow and thick foundation. 'The full glitter cut crease for a hospitality job? I had much more energy then' she joked in her caption. It comes after Abbie slammed ticket sellers for allegedly informing fans about show cancellations via 'cold and random' texts . The FBoy Island host's upcoming national Trauma Dump tour has been hit with difficulties over low ticket sales, forcing her to cancel a string of shows. Abbie, 29, has so far confirmed that she has axed four of the scheduled 13 shows - Ballarat, Port Macquarie, Caloundra, and Cairns, cancelled due to low demand . title: Unwetter: Teile Tschechiens, Polens und Österreichs sind unter Wasser
content: In Polen und Tschechien sorgen Unwetter weiterhin für massive Überschwemmungen. In Niederösterreich spitzt sich die Hochwasserlage zu. Dort starb ein Feuerwehrmann bei einem Pumpeinsatz. Im südosteuropäischen EU-Land Rumänien kamen durch Starkregen und schwere Überschwemmungen mindestens fünf Menschen ums Leben. Und auch in Ostsachsen müssen sich die Bewohner in den kommenden Tagen weiter auf steigende Pegelstände an den Flüssen einstellen. Besonders dramatisch ist die Situation in der tschechischen Stadt Krnov, die fast komplett überflutet worden ist. Der stellvertretende Bürgermeister Miroslav Binar sagte der Agentur CTK zufolge, dass geschätzt 70 bis 80 Prozent des Stadtgebiets unter Wasser stünden. Für eine Evakuierung sei es nun zu spät. Die Kommune sei nicht mehr in der Lage, die Hilfe für die Bürger zu organisieren. Man stehe daher im Kontakt mit der übergeordneten Verwaltungsregion Mährisch-Schlesien. Die Lage sei schlimmer als bei der Flutkatastrophe von 1997. Jahrhunderthochwasser an Dutzenden Stationen In Krnov, das rund 240 Kilometer östlich von Prag liegt und knapp 23.000 Einwohner hat, vereinen sich die Flüsse Opava und Opavice. Hubschrauber waren im Einsatz, um Menschen in Not aus der Luft zu retten. Kritisch war die Situation auch an vielen anderen Orten im Osten des Landes, etwa in den Städten Opava und Ostrava. Landesweit galt an mehr als 120 Pegel-Messstationen die höchste Hochwasser-Alarmstufe. An mehr als 50 Stationen wurde sogar...

title: Rennes routs Montpellier 3-0 in French league
creator: AP
content: PARIS (AP) — The French league season marking Montpellier's 50th anniversary is just four matches old, but there are alarming signs it could be a nightmare for the southern city's team. Montpellier's ambitions have been hampered by the significant drop in television rights revenues , preventing the club from securing the reinforcements it planned. The result? Montpellier sits in last place and is still winless after Sunday's 3-0 loss at Rennes that marked its third defeat in four matches so far. In addition to its financial issues, Montpellier traveled to Rennes with several injured players — its three left-backs are currently sidelined — and was second best throughout the afternoon. Ludovic Blas put the hosts in front in the 24th minute and goals from Arnaud Kalimuendo and Albert Gronbaek completed the win. It was Rennes' second victory this season. Montpellier won the French league title once, in 2012, when it upset Paris Saint-Germain. Montpellier’s title-winning squad featured nine homegrown players, in contrast to PSG’s relentless pursuit of stars at the expense of its own youth academy. The club also won the second division title in 1987 and the French Cup in 1990 with a team featuring the likes of Eric Cantona, Laurent Blanc and Julio Cesar. PSG stayed in command at the top of the standings with a fourth win in as many games on Saturday. Ousmane Dembélé scored twice in the 3-1 win against Brest. PSG has a two-point lead at the top.
